papers.abstract: The congestion control (CC) algorithm is expected to achieve consistent high performance under different network environments. Traditionally, classic CCs are designed with the methodology of inferring path conditions to guide the rate adjustment. However, this methodology suffers from wrong path condition inferences in certain cases, which mislead the rate adjustment and lead to performance degradation. To avoid wrong path condition inferences, we develop the projection-based introspective method and design the introspective congestion control (ICC) algorithm in this paper. Specifically, the rate adjustment rules are designed to possess a specialized profile such that the projection of the profile can be distinguished under unchanged path conditions. In this way, the projection, which can be distinguished from the time series of delay signals in the frequency domain, facilitates ICC to extract more information for path condition inferences. Consequently, with the introspection on the projection, ICC can avoid being misled by wrong path condition inferences and thus achieve consistent high performance under different conditions. The advantages of ICC are confirmed through extensive experiments conducted on various locally emulated scenarios, global testbeds over the Internet, and the Alipay platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 拥塞控制（CC）算法有望在不同的网络环境下实现一致的高性能。传统上，经典的CC是通过推断路径条件来指导速率调整的方法来设计的。然而，这种方法在某些情况下会受到错误的路径条件推断，从而误导速率调整并导致性能下降。为了避免错误的路径条件推断，我们在本文中开发了基于投影的内省方法并设计了内省拥塞控制（ICC）算法。具体地，速率调整规则被设计为具有专门的轮廓，使得在不变的路径条件下可以区分轮廓的投影。这样，可以与频域延迟信号的时间序列区分开来的投影，有利于ICC提取更多信息用于路径条件推断。因此，通过对投影的内省，ICC可以避免被错误的路径条件推断所误导，从而在不同条件下获得一致的高性能。通过在各种本地模拟场景、互联网全球测试平台和支付宝平台上进行的大量实验，证实了 ICC 的优势。

papers.title: JABAS: Joint Adaptive Batching and Automatic Scaling for DNN Training on Heterogeneous GPUs.
papers.abstract: Adaptive batching is a promising technique to reduce the communication and synchronization overhead for training Deep Neural Network (DNN) models. In this paper, we study how to speed up the training of a DNN model using adaptive batching, without degrading the convergence performance in a heterogeneous GPU cluster. We propose a novel DNN training system, called JABAS (Joint Adaptive Batching and Automatic Scaling). In JABAS, a DNN training job is executed on a DNN training framework called IIDP, which provides the same theoretical convergence rate of distributed SGD in a heterogeneous GPU cluster. To maximize the performance of the job with adaptive batching, JABAS employs adaptive batching and automatic resource scaling jointly. JABAS changes a global batch size every p iterations in a fine-grained manner within an epoch, while auto-scaling to the best GPU allocation for the next epoch in a coarse-grained manner. Using three heterogeneous GPU clusters, we evaluate JABAS for seven DNN models including large language models. Our experimental results demonstrate that JABAS provides 33.3% shorter training time and 54.2% lower training cost than the state-of-the-art adaptive training techniques, on average, without any accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: 自适应批处理是一种很有前途的技术，可以减少训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型的通信和同步开销。在本文中，我们研究如何使用自适应批处理加速 DNN 模型的训练，而不降低异构 GPU 集群中的收敛性能。我们提出了一种新颖的 DNN 训练系统，称为 JABAS（联合自适应批处理和自动缩放）。在 JABAS 中，DNN 训练作业在称为 IIDP 的 DNN 训练框架上执行，该框架提供与异构 GPU 集群中的分布式 SGD 相同的理论收敛速度。为了通过自适应批处理最大限度地提高作业性能，JABAS 联合采用自适应批处理和自动资源扩展。 JABAS 在一个时期内以细粒度的方式每 p 次迭代更改全局批量大小，同时以粗粒度的方式自动缩放到下一个时期的最佳 GPU 分配。使用三个异构 GPU 集群，我们评估了七个 DNN 模型（包括大型语言模型）的 JABAS。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的自适应训练技术相比，JABAS 的训练时间平均缩短了 33.3%，训练成本降低了 54.2%，且没有任何准确性损失。

papers.title: Jupiter: Pushing Speed and Scalability Limitations for Subgraph Matching on Multi-GPUs.
papers.abstract: Graph pattern matching (GPM) aims to find subgraphs isomorphic to user-specified patterns within a large graph. Due to its ability to reveal potential relationships among entities in complex networks, it is widely applied in various fields, such as mining molecular structures in bioinformatics, detecting fraud in cloud-based e-commerce, and querying knowledge graphs in large language model. The explosion of data brought by the AI era has rendered traditional GPM systems inadequate for real-world needs. Due to the intricate data dependencies of GPM tasks, most SOTA GPM systems currently have limited scalability and performance, they perform well in small graph mining with single node but cannot scale to modern clusters with GPU acceleration. This paper introduces JUPITER, the first system capable of matching patterns on large graph across multi-node GPU clusters, which can handle graphs 10 times larger than SOTAs with the same memory resources. Its core principle is to delegate computation to the data-residing processing unit rather than pulling data to the computation location, which greatly improves communication efficiency. Experimental results show that JUPITER can reduce communication volume by two orders of magnitude compared to SOTA subgraph matching systems, achieving up to 120× speedup and an average of 21.5× speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 图模式匹配（GPM）旨在在大图中找到与用户指定模式同构的子图。由于其能够揭示复杂网络中实体之间的潜在关系，因此被广泛应用于各个领域，例如生物信息学中的分子结构挖掘、基于云的电子商务中的欺诈检测以及大语言模型中的知识图查询。人工智能时代带来的数据爆炸使得传统的GPM系统无法满足现实世界的需求。由于GPM任务复杂的数据依赖性，目前大多数SOTA GPM系统的可扩展性和性能有限，它们在单节点的小图挖掘中表现良好，但无法扩展到具有GPU加速的现代集群。本文介绍了 JUPITER，这是第一个能够跨多节点 GPU 集群在大型图上进行模式匹配的系统，在相同的内存资源下，它可以处理比 SOTA 大 10 倍的图。其核心原理是将计算委托给驻留数据的处理单元，而不是将数据拉到计算位置，这大大提高了通信效率。实验结果表明，与SOTA子图匹配系统相比，JUPITER可以将通信量减少两个数量级，实现高达120倍的加速，平均21.5倍的加速。

papers.title: Ladon: High-Performance Multi-BFT Consensus via Dynamic Global Ordering.
papers.abstract:
Multi-BFT consensus runs multiple leader-based consensus instances in parallel, circumventing the leader bottleneck of a single instance. However, it contains an Achilles' heel: the need to globally order output blocks across instances. Deriving this global ordering is challenging because it must cope with different rates at which blocks are produced by instances. Prior Multi-BFT designs assign each block a global index before creation, leading to poor performance.

We propose Ladon, a high-performance Multi-BFT protocol that allows varying instance block rates. Our key idea is to order blocks across instances dynamically, which eliminates blocking on slow instances. We achieve dynamic global ordering by assigning monotonic ranks to blocks. We pipeline rank coordination with the consensus process to reduce protocol overhead and combine aggregate signatures with rank information to reduce message complexity. Ladon's dynamic ordering enables blocks to be globally ordered according to their generation, which respects inter-block causality. We implemented and evaluated Ladon by integrating it with both PBFT and HotStuff protocols. Our evaluation shows that Ladon-PBFT (resp., Ladon-HotStuff) improves the peak throughput of the prior art by ≈ 8× (resp., 2×) and reduces latency by ≈ 62% (resp., 23%), when deployed with one straggling replica (out of 128 replicas) in a WAN setting.
papers.abstract_zh:
多 BFT 共识并行运行多个基于 Leader 的共识实例，规避了单个实例的 Leader 瓶颈。然而，它有一个致命弱点：需要跨实例对输出块进行全局排序。导出这种全局排序具有挑战性，因为它必须应对实例生成块的不同速率。先前的 Multi-BFT 设计在创建之前为每个块分配一个全局索引，导致性能不佳。

我们提出了 Ladon，一种高性能的 Multi-BFT 协议，允许改变实例块速率。我们的关键思想是动态地跨实例排序块，这消除了慢速实例上的阻塞。我们通过为块分配单调排名来实现动态全局排序。我们将等级协调与共识过程进行管道化，以减少协议开销，并将聚合签名与等级信息相结合，以降低消息复杂性。 Ladon 的动态排序使区块能够根据其生成进行全局排序，从而尊重区块间的因果关系。我们通过将 Ladon 与 PBFT 和 HotStuff 协议集成来实现和评估它。我们的评估表明，当在 WAN 设置中部署一个落后副本（128 个副本中）时，Ladon-PBFT（分别为 Ladon-HotStuff）将现有技术的峰值吞吐量提高了约 8 倍（分别为 2 倍），并将延迟减少了约 62%（分别为 23%）。

papers.title: LOFT: A Lock-free and Adaptive Learned Index with High Scalability for Dynamic Workloads.
papers.abstract: In order to mitigate memory overheads and reduce data movements in the critical path, a computational and space-efficient learned index is promising to deliver high performance and complement traditional index structures, which unfortunately works well only in static workloads. In dynamic workloads, the learned indexes incur performance degradation with poor scalability due to inefficient data placement for newly inserted items and intensive lock contention. Furthermore, the model retraining is time-consuming and blocking, which hampers the performance of index operations. In order to meet the needs of dynamic workloads and efficient retraining, we propose LOFT, a highly scalable and adaptive learned index with lock-free design and self-tuning retraining technique to provide high throughput and low latency. LOFT enables all index operations to be concurrently executed in a lock-free manner by using Compare-and-Swap (CAS) primitive and an expanded learned bucket to handle the overflowed data. To minimize the impact of model retraining, LOFT leverages a shadow node to serve the clients' requests and accelerates the retraining process with the aid of index operations. To accommodate dynamic workloads, LOFT determines when and how to perform retraining based on inferred access patterns. Our extensive evaluation on YCSB and real-world workloads demonstrates that LOFT effectively improves the performance by up to 14× than state-of-the-art designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了减轻内存开销并减少关键路径中的数据移动，计算和空间高效的学习索引有望提供高性能并补充传统索引结构，不幸的是，传统索引结构仅在静态工作负载中运行良好。在动态工作负载中，由于新插入项的数据放置效率低下和密集的锁争用，学习索引会导致性能下降和可扩展性差。此外，模型重新训练非常耗时且阻塞，这会影响索引操作的性能。为了满足动态工作负载和高效再训练的需求，我们提出了LOFT，一种高度可扩展和自适应的学习索引，具有无锁设计和自调整再训练技术，以提供高吞吐量和低延迟。 LOFT 通过使用比较和交换（CAS）原语和扩展学习桶来处理溢出数据，使所有索引操作能够以无锁方式并发执行。为了最大限度地减少模型重新训练的影响，LOFT利用影子节点来服务客户的请求，并借助索引操作加速重新训练过程。为了适应动态工作负载，LOFT 根据推断的访问模式确定何时以及如何执行重新训练。我们对 YCSB 和实际工作负载的广泛评估表明，LOFT 有效地将性能比最先进的设计提高了 14 倍。

papers.title: Marlin: Enabling High-Throughput Congestion Control Testing in Large-Scale Networks.
papers.abstract: Cloud providers require high-throughput traffic to test the effectiveness of congestion control (CC) configurations (i.e., CC algorithm selection and their parameter settings) in networks. A network tester capable of evaluating CC configurations needs to fulfill the following requirements: (R1) Capable of generating traffic with CC behaviors. (R2) Ability to customize CC algorithms. (R3) High throughput CC traffic generation. However, existing network testers fail to meet these requirements simultaneously. The paper presents Marlin, a novel high-throughput network tester designed for CC evaluation. Marlin leverages a high-throughput, low-programmability device to amplify the traffic generated by a low-throughput, high-programmability device. The low-throughput device is responsible for complex computational tasks, such as running CC and flow scheduling algorithms, and communicates with the high-throughput device at a high frequency using small packets to instruct it to generate high-throughput traffic with CC behaviors. This hybrid approach allows for customizable, high-throughput CC testing. Our experiments demonstrate that Marlin can accurately emulate CC behaviors and replicate real-world scenarios. Marlin can generate 1.2 Tbps of CC traffic using a single programmable switch pipeline and one 100 Gbps port of an FPGA NIC, supporting up to 65,536 concurrent flows.
papers.abstract_zh: 云提供商需要高吞吐量流量来测试网络中拥塞控制 (CC) 配置（即 CC 算法选择及其参数设置）的有效性。能够评估 CC 配置的网络测试仪需要满足以下要求： (R1) 能够生成具有 CC 行为的流量。 (R2) 能够定制CC算法。 (R3) 高吞吐量 CC 流量生成。然而，现有的网络测试仪无法同时满足这些要求。本文介绍了 Marlin，一种专为 CC 评估而设计的新型高吞吐量网络测试仪。 Marlin 利用高吞吐量、低可编程性设备来放大低吞吐量、高可编程性设备生成的流量。低吞吐量设备负责复杂的计算任务，例如运行CC和流调度算法，并使用小数据包与高吞吐量设备进行高频通信，指示其通过CC行为生成高吞吐量流量。这种混合方法允许进行可定制的高通量 CC 测试。我们的实验表明，Marlin 可以准确地模拟 CC 行为并复制现实世界的场景。 Marlin 可以使用单个可编程交换机管道和 FPGA NIC 的一个 100 Gbps 端口生成 1.2 Tbps 的 CC 流量，支持多达 65,536 个并发流。

papers.title: MEPipe: Democratizing LLM Training with Memory-Efficient Slice-Level Pipeline Scheduling on Cost-Effective Accelerators.
papers.abstract:
The training of large language models (LLMs) typically needs costly GPUs, such as NVIDIA A100 or H100. They possess substantial high-bandwidth on-chip memory and rapid interconnects like NVLinks. The exorbitant expenses associated with LLM training pose not just an economic challenge but also a societal one, as it restricts the ability to train LLMs from scratch to a selected few organizations.

There is a significant interest in democratizing access to LLM training. This paper explores a potential solution by employing innovative parallel strategies on more affordable accelerators. Budget-friendly options like NVIDIA RTX 4090, while considerably less expensive and comparable in computational power to A100, are hindered by their limited memory capacity and reduced interconnect bandwidth, making the effective training of LLMs challenging.

Conventional parallel strategies often result in high communication costs or excessive memory usage. Our paper introduces MEPipe, a novel approach that includes a slice-level scheduling method for sequence pipeline parallelism. This method minimizes memory consumption without incurring additional communication overhead. Besides, MEPipe utilizes fine-grained weight gradient computation to reduce idle time and mitigate imbalanced computation among slices.

MEPipe has demonstrated up to 1.68× speedup (1.35× on average) on clusters equipped with 64 NVIDIA 4090 GPUs when training Llama models of varying sizes. 35% Model FLOPS Utilization (MFU) is achieved in training Llama 13B model, being 2.5x more cost-effective than A100 clusters.
papers.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 的训练通常需要昂贵的 GPU，例如 NVIDIA A100 或 H100。它们拥有大量高带宽片上存储器和 NVLink 等快速互连。与法学硕士培训相关的高昂费用不仅带来了经济挑战，而且还带来了社会挑战，因为它限制了从零开始向选定的少数组织培训法学硕士的能力。

人们对法学硕士培训的民主化有着浓厚的兴趣。本文通过在更实惠的加速器上采用创新的并行策略来探索潜在的解决方案。 NVIDIA RTX 4090 等经济实惠的选项虽然价格便宜得多，计算能力与 A100 相当，但由于内存容量有限和互连带宽减少而受到阻碍，这使得法学硕士的有效训练充满挑战。

传统的并行策略通常会导致高昂的通信成本或过多的内存使用。我们的论文介绍了 MEPipe，这是一种新颖的方法，其中包括用于序列管道并行性的切片级调度方法。此方法最大限度地减少了内存消耗，而不会产生额外的通信开销。此外，MEPipe利用细粒度的权重梯度计算来减少空闲时间并减轻切片之间的不平衡计算。

在训练不同大小的 Llama 模型时，MEPipe 在配备 64 个 NVIDIA 4090 GPU 的集群上展示了高达 1.68 倍的加速（平均 1.35 倍）。 Llama 13B 模型的训练实现了 35% 的模型 FLOPS 利用率 (MFU)，比 A100 集群的成本效益提高了 2.5 倍。

papers.title: MetaHG: Enhancing HGNN Systems Leveraging Advanced Metapath Graph Abstraction.
papers.abstract: Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks (HGNNs) are pivotal for extracting semantic and structural information from heterogeneous graphs. Traditional HGNN implementations often grapple with the challenges of excessive metapath instances, requiring substantial storage or incurring high instance-matching overhead. These methods typically suffer from redundant instance encoding and costly semantic graph construction. Addressing these issues, we introduce an advanced Metapath Graph (MG) abstraction that encapsulates the structural information of all metapath instances within a compact representation. This approach significantly reduces storage demands, eliminates redundant instance encodings, and foregoes the need for constructing semantic graphs, thereby facilitating rapid HGNN inference. Our software-based system, MetaHG, leverages layerwise encoding and aggregation to avoid redundancies without the necessity of semantic graphs. It incorporates a fast, lightweight partitioning method to efficiently manage large graphs. Distinctively, MetaHG seamlessly integrates with both dynamic HGNNs and homogeneous GNNs, unlike conventional systems. Comparative evaluations demonstrate that MetaHG surpasses the state-of-the-art BFS- and DFS-based HGNN systems, MAGNN and the software implementation of MetaNMP, by 42.5× and 4.53×, respectively, on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 异构图神经网络（HGNN）对于从异构图中提取语义和结构信息至关重要。传统的 HGNN 实现经常面临元路径实例过多的挑战，需要大量存储或产生较高的实例匹配开销。这些方法通常遭受冗余实例编码和昂贵的语义图构建的困扰。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了高级元路径图（MG）抽象，它将所有元路径实例的结构信息封装在一个紧凑的表示中。这种方法显着减少了存储需求，消除了冗余的实例编码，并放弃了构建语义图的需要，从而促进了快速 HGNN 推理。我们基于软件的系统 MetaHG 利用分层编码和聚合来避免冗余，而无需语义图。它采用快速、轻量级的分区方法来有效管理大型图。与传统系统不同，MetaHG 与动态 HGNN 和同构 GNN 无缝集成。比较评估表明，MetaHG 平均分别超过了最先进的基于 BFS 和 DFS 的 HGNN 系统、MAGNN 和 MetaNMP 的软件实现 42.5 倍和 4.53 倍。

papers.title: Mist: Efficient Distributed Training of Large Language Models via Memory-Parallelism Co-Optimization.
papers.abstract: Various parallelism, such as data, tensor, and pipeline parallelism, along with memory optimizations like activation checkpointing, redundancy elimination, and offloading, have been proposed to accelerate distributed training for Large Language Models. To find the best combination of these techniques, automatic distributed training systems are proposed. However, existing systems only tune a subset of optimizations, due to the lack of overlap awareness, inability to navigate the vast search space, and ignoring the inter-microbatch imbalance, leading to sub-optimal performance. To address these shortcomings, we propose Mist, a memory, overlap, and imbalance-aware automatic distributed training system that comprehensively co-optimizes all memory footprint reduction techniques alongside parallelism. Mist is based on three key ideas: (1) fine-grained overlap-centric scheduling, orchestrating optimizations in an overlapped manner, (2) symbolic-based performance analysis that predicts runtime and memory usage using symbolic expressions for fast tuning, and (3) imbalance-aware hierarchical tuning, decoupling the process into an inter-stage imbalance and overlap aware Mixed Integer Linear Programming problem and an intra-stage Dual-Objective Constrained Optimization problem, and connecting them through Pareto frontier sampling. Our evaluation results show that Mist achieves an average of 1.28× (up to 1.73×) and 1.27× (up to 2.04×) speedup compared to state-of-the-art manual system Megatron-LM and state-of-the-art automatic system Aceso, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们提出了各种并行性（例如数据、张量和管道并行性）以及内存优化（例如激活检查点、冗余消除和卸载）来加速大型语言模型的分布式训练。为了找到这些技术的最佳组合，提出了自动分布式训练系统。然而，由于缺乏重叠意识、无法导航巨大的搜索空间以及忽略微批次间的不平衡，现有系统仅调整优化的子集，从而导致性能次佳。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了 Mist，一种内存、重叠和不平衡感知的自动分布式训练系统，可全面共同优化所有内存占用减少技术以及并行性。 Mist 基于三个关键思想：(1) 以重叠为中心的细粒度调度，以重叠方式编排优化；(2) 基于符号的性能分析，使用符号表达式预测运行时和内存使用情况以进行快速调优；(3) 不平衡感知分层调优，将过程解耦为阶段间不平衡和重叠感知混合整数线性规划问题和阶段内双目标约束优化问题，并通过 Pareto 前沿采样将它们连接起来。我们的评估结果表明，与最先进的手动系统 Megatron-LM 和最先进的自动系统 Aceso 相比，Mist 分别实现了平均 1.28 倍（高达 1.73 倍）和 1.27 倍（高达 2.04 倍）的加速。

papers.title: Moko: Marrying Python with Big Data Systems.
papers.abstract: Python stands as the preferred language for data science, thanks to its user-friendly syntax and a robust ecosystem that effortlessly accommodates a variety of data types and workloads, such as relational/tabular data, tensors, and graphs. While Python thrives in smaller data settings, it struggles to scale in distributed big data environments. MOKO is an IR-based execution framework designed to extend Python's reach into the distributed big data domain by generating code that can utilize existing systems such as Spark, Dask, Torch, and GRAPE. Moko preserves Python's key features---interoperability, ease of use, and support for multi-model data types and workloads---while enabling efficient execution in a distributed setting. Our evaluation indicates that MOKO can accelerate Python applications by up to 11× across diverse systems, diminish data alignment overhead by 28×, and outperform hand-optimized solutions by 2.5×.
papers.abstract_zh: Python 因其用户友好的语法和强大的生态系统而成为数据科学的首选语言，可以轻松适应各种数据类型和工作负载，例如关系/表格数据、张量和图形。虽然 Python 在较小的数据环境中蓬勃发展，但它在分布式大数据环境中难以扩展。 MOKO 是一个基于 IR 的执行框架，旨在通过生成可利用 Spark、Dask、Torch 和 GRAPE 等现有系统的代码，将 Python 的影响力扩展到分布式大数据领域。 Moko 保留了 Python 的关键特性——互操作性、易用性以及对多模型数据类型和工作负载的支持——同时支持在分布式环境中高效执行。我们的评估表明，MOKO 可以在不同系统上将 Python 应用程序加速高达 11 倍，将数据对齐开销减少 28 倍，并且比手动优化的解决方案性能提高 2.5 倍。

papers.title: Multi-Grained Specifications for Distributed System Model Checking and Verification.
papers.abstract: This paper presents our experience specifying and verifying the correctness of ZooKeeper, a complex and evolving distributed coordination system. We use TLA+ to model finegrained behaviors of ZooKeeper and use the TLC model checker to verify its correctness properties; we also check conformance between the model and code. The fundamental challenge is to balance the granularity of specifications and the scalability of model checking---fine-grained specifications lead to state-space explosion, while coarse-grained specifications introduce model-code gaps. To address this challenge, we write specifications with different granularities for composable modules, and compose them into mixed-grained specifications based on specific scenarios. For example, to verify code changes, we compose fine-grained specifications of changed modules and coarse-grained specifications that abstract away details of unchanged code with preserved interactions. We show that writing multi-grained specifications is a viable practice and can cope with model-code gaps without untenable state space, especially for evolving software where changes are typically local and incremental. We detected six severe bugs that violate five types of invariants and verified their code fixes; the fixes have been merged to ZooKeeper. We also improve the protocol design to make it easy to implement correctly.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们指定和验证 ZooKeeper（一个复杂且不断发展的分布式协调系统）正确性的经验。我们使用 TLA+ 对 ZooKeeper 的细粒度行为进行建模，并使用 TLC 模型检查器来验证其正确性属性；我们还检查模型和代码之间的一致性。根本的挑战是平衡规范的粒度和模型检查的可扩展性——细粒度的规范会导致状态空间爆炸，而粗粒度的规范会引入模型代码间隙。为了应对这一挑战，我们为可组合模块编写不同粒度的规范，并根据具体场景将其组合成混合粒度的规范。例如，为了验证代码更改，我们编写了更改模块的细粒度规范和粗粒度规范，这些规范通过保留的交互抽象了未更改代码的细节。我们表明，编写多粒度规范是一种可行的实践，并且可以在没有无法维持的状态空间的情况下应对模型代码间隙，特别是对于通常是本地和增量变化的不断发展的软件。我们检测到了六个违反五种不变量的严重错误，并验证了它们的代码修复；这些修复已合并到 ZooKeeper 中。我们还改进了协议设计，使其易于正确实现。

papers.title: Multiplexing Dynamic Deep Learning Workloads with SLO-awareness in GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract:
Deep learning (DL) inference services are widely recognized as crucial workloads in large-scale cloud clusters. However, due to the stringent latency requirements, cloud providers often over-provision GPU resources, resulting in underutilization of the available GPU potential. Although co-locating tasks on the same device can enhance utilization, ensuring Service Level Objectives (SLOs) guarantees for multiplexing highly dynamic inference services becomes extremely challenging due to significant resource interference.

In this paper, we introduce Mudi, a new SLO-aware system designed to optimize the utilization of GPU resources within large-scale clusters. Mudi achieves this by efficiently multiplexing DL inference services with training tasks through spatial sharing. The fundamental concept behind Mudi involves profiling the latency of inference services using a piece-wise linear function that accurately captures resource interference. Leveraging this quantification of interference, Mudi designs a scalable cluster-wide co-location policy, determining the optimal multiplexing of training tasks and inference services to maximize resource efficiency. Furthermore, Mudi incorporates adaptive batching and resource scaling mechanisms to rapidly adapt to the dynamic workloads. Experimental results demonstrate that Mudi improves 42% of GPU resource utilization and achieves up to 2.27× higher training efficiency while satisfying inference SLOs, as compared to state-of-the-art multiplexing methods.
papers.abstract_zh:
深度学习 (DL) 推理服务被广泛认为是大规模云集群中的关键工作负载。然而，由于严格的延迟要求，云提供商经常过度配置 GPU 资源，导致可用 GPU 潜力的利用不足。尽管在同一设备上共置任务可以提高利用率，但由于严重的资源干扰，确保多路复用高度动态推理服务的服务级别目标 (SLO) 变得极具挑战性。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Mudi，这是一种新的 SLO 感知系统，旨在优化大规模集群中 GPU 资源的利用率。 Mudi 通过空间共享有效地将深度学习推理服务与训练任务复用来实现这一目标。 Mudi 背后的基本概念涉及使用分段线性函数来分析推理服务的延迟，该函数可以准确捕获资源干扰。利用这种干扰量化，Mudi 设计了可扩展的集群范围内的共置策略，确定训练任务和推理服务的最佳复用，以最大限度地提高资源效率。此外，Mudi 还结合了自适应批处理和资源扩展机制，可以快速适应动态工作负载。实验结果表明，与最先进的复用方法相比，Mudi 在满足推理 SLO 的同时，GPU 资源利用率提高了 42%，训练效率提高了 2.27 倍。

papers.title: NeuStream: Bridging Deep Learning Serving and Stream Processing.
papers.abstract: Modern Deep Neural Network (DNN) exhibits a pattern where multiple sub-models are executed, guided by control flows such as loops and switch/merge operations. This dynamic nature introduces complexities in batching the requests of such DNNs for efficient execution on GPUs. In this paper, we present NeuStream, a programming model and runtime system for serving deep learning workloads using stream processing. NeuStream decomposes the inference workflow into modules and forms them into a streaming processing system where a request flows through. Based on such abstraction, NeuStream is able to batch requests at fine-grained module granularity. To maximize serving goodput, NeuStream exploits a two-level scheduling approach to decide the best batching requests and resource allocation for each module while satisfying service level objectives (SLOs). Our evaluation of NeuStream on a set of modern DNNs like Large Language Models (LLM) and diffusion models, etc., shows that NeuStream significantly improves goodput compared to state-of-the-art DNN serving systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代深度神经网络 (DNN) 呈现出一种执行多个子模型的模式，由循环和切换/合并操作等控制流引导。这种动态特性带来了批处理此类 DNN 请求以在 GPU 上高效执行的复杂性。在本文中，我们提出了 NeuStream，一种编程模型和运行时系统，用于使用流处理来服务深度学习工作负载。 NeuStream将推理工作流程分解为模块，并将其形成请求流经的流处理系统。基于这样的抽象，NeuStream能够以细粒度的模块粒度对请求进行批处理。为了最大限度地提高服务吞吐量，NeuStream 利用两级调度方法来决定每个模块的最佳批处理请求和资源分配，同时满足服务级别目标 (SLO)。我们在一组现代 DNN（例如大型语言模型 (LLM) 和扩散模型等）上对 NeuStream 进行的评估表明，与最先进的 DNN 服务系统相比，NeuStream 显着提高了吞吐量。

papers.title: Occamy: A Preemptive Buffer Management for On-chip Shared-memory Switches.
papers.abstract:
Today's high-speed switches employ an on-chip shared packet buffer. The buffer is becoming increasingly insufficient as it cannot scale with the growing switching capacity. Nonetheless, the buffer needs to face highly intense bursts and meet stringent performance requirements for datacenter applications. This imposes rigorous demand on the Buffer Management (BM) scheme, which dynamically allocates the buffer across queues. However, the de facto BM scheme, designed over two decades ago, is ill-suited to meet the requirements of today's network.

In this paper, we argue that shallow-buffer switches, intense bursts, along with dynamic traffic call for a highly agile BM that can quickly adjust the buffer allocation as traffic changes. However, the agility of the current BM is fundamentally limited by its non-preemptive nature. Nonetheless, we find that preemptive BM, considered unrealizable in history, is now feasible on modern switch chips. We propose Occamy1, a preemptive BM that can quickly adjust buffer allocation. Occamy utilizes the redundant memory bandwidth to actively reclaim and reallocate the over-allocated buffer. Testbed experiments and large-scale simulations show that Occamy can improve the end-to-end performance by up to ~55%.
papers.abstract_zh:
当今的高速交换机采用片上共享数据包缓冲区。缓冲区变得越来越不足，因为它无法随着交换容量的增长而扩展。尽管如此，缓冲器需要面对高强度的突发并满足数据中心应用严格的性能要求。这对缓冲区管理（BM）方案提出了严格的要求，该方案跨队列动态分配缓冲区。然而，事实上的BM方案是二十多年前设计的，已经不能满足当今网络的要求。

在本文中，我们认为浅缓冲区交换、剧烈突发以及动态流量需要高度敏捷的 BM，以便能够随着流量变化快速调整缓冲区分配。然而，当前BM的敏捷性从根本上受到其非先发制人的性质的限制。尽管如此，我们发现历史上被认为无法实现的抢占式BM现在在现代交换芯片上是可行的。我们提出了 Occamy1，一种可以快速调整缓冲区分配的抢占式 BM。 Occamy 利用冗余内存带宽主动回收并重新分配过度分配的缓冲区。测试床实验和大规模模拟表明，Occamy 可以将端到端性能提高高达约 55%。

papers.title: OHMiner: An Overlap-centric System for Efficient Hypergraph Pattern Mining.
papers.abstract: Hypergraph Pattern Mining (HPM) aims to identify all the instances of user-interested subhypergraphs (patterns) in hypergraphs, which has been widely used in various applications. However, existing solutions either need significant enumeration overhead because they extend subhypergraphs at the granularity of vertices, or suffer from massive redundant computations because they often need to repeatedly fetch and process the same incident hyperedges for different vertices. This paper presents an overlap-centric system named OHMiner to efficiently support HPM. OHMiner proposes an overlap-centric execution model to determine the subhypergraphs isomorphism through computing and comparing overlaps among hyperedges using set operations. This model aims to efficiently handle the vertices that collectively share the same incident hyperedges. To automatically and precisely retrieve an arbitrary pattern's overlapping semantics without performing redundant set computations, OHMiner further proposes a redundancy-free compiler, which constructs an Overlap Intersection Graph (OIG) for the pattern, optimizes the OIG, and generates an overlap-centric execution plan to guide the procedure of HPM. Moreover, OHMiner designs an overlap-centric parallel execution engine, which adopts an incremental overlap-pruned approach to fast validate candidates for HPM. Additionally, it proposes a degree-aware data store to support efficient generation of candidates. Through evaluating OHMiner on a broad range of real-world hypergraphs with various patterns, our experimental results show that OHMiner outperforms the state-of-the-art HPM system by 5.4×-22.2×.
papers.abstract_zh: 超图模式挖掘（HPM）旨在识别超图中用户感兴趣的子超图（模式）的所有实例，已广泛应用于各种应用中。然而，现有的解决方案要么需要大量的枚举开销，因为它们以顶点的粒度扩展子超图，要么遭受大量冗余计算，因为它们经常需要重复获取和处理不同顶点的相同事件超边。本文提出了一个名为 OHMiner 的以重叠为中心的系统，以有效支持 HPM。 OHMiner 提出了一种以重叠为中心的执行模型，通过使用集合运算计算和比较超边之间的重叠来确定子超图同构。该模型旨在有效地处理共同共享相同事件超边的顶点。为了在不执行冗余集合计算的情况下自动精确地检索任意模式的重叠语义，OHMiner 进一步提出了一种无冗余编译器，它为该模式构造重叠交集图（OIG），优化 OIG，并生成以重叠为中心的执行计划来指导 HPM 的过程。此外，OHMiner 设计了一个以重叠为中心的并行执行引擎，它采用增量重叠修剪方法来快速验证 HPM 的候选者。此外，它还提出了一个学位感知数据存储来支持高效生成候选人。通过在具有各种模式的广泛现实世界超图上评估 OHMiner，我们的实验结果表明，OHMiner 的性能比最先进的 HPM 系统高出 5.4×-22.2×。

papers.title: Optimizing Task Scheduling in Cloud VMs with Accurate vCPU Abstraction.
papers.abstract: The paper shows that task scheduling in Cloud VMs hasn't evolved quickly to handle the dynamic vCPU resources. The existing vCPU abstraction cannot accurately depict the vCPU dynamics in capacity, activity, and topology, and these mismatches can mislead the scheduler, causing performance degradation and system anomalies. The paper proposes a novel solution, vSched, which probes accurate vCPU abstraction through a set of lightweight microbenchmarks (vProbers) without modifying the hypervisor, and leverages the probed information to optimize task scheduling in cloud VMs with three new techniques: biased vCPU selection, intra-VM harvesting, and relaxed work conservation. Our evaluation of vSched's implementation in x86 Linux Kernel demonstrates that it can effectively improve both system throughput and workload latency across various VM types in the dynamic multi-cloud environment.
papers.abstract_zh: 该论文表明，云虚拟机中的任务调度尚未快速发展以处理动态 vCPU 资源。现有的 vCPU 抽象无法准确描述 vCPU 的容量、活动和拓扑动态，这些不匹配可能会误导调度程序，导致性能下降和系统异常。本文提出了一种新颖的解决方案 vSched，它通过一组轻量级微基准测试 (vProbers) 来探测准确的 vCPU 抽象，而无需修改虚拟机管理程序，并利用探测到的信息通过三种新技术来优化云虚拟机中的任务调度：偏向 vCPU 选择、虚拟机内部收获和宽松的工作保护。我们对 x86 Linux 内核中 vSched 实施的评估表明，它可以有效提高动态多云环境中各种虚拟机类型的系统吞吐量和工作负载延迟。

papers.title: Overcoming the Last Mile between Log-Structured File Systems and Persistent Memory via Scatter Logging.
papers.abstract:
Log-structured file system (LFS) has been a popular option for persistent memory (PM) for its high write performance and lightweight crash consistency protocols. However, even with PM's byte-addressable I/O interface, existing PM LFSes still maintain contiguous space for log locality while using heavy garbage collection (GC) to synchronously reclaim space, causing up to 50% I/O performance degradation on PM. Thus, there exists a last-mile problem between the contiguous space management of LFS (that induces GC) and the non-contiguous byte-addressability of PM.

To overcome this, we propose a novel scatter logging technique called SLOT. The core idea is to efficiently manage non-contiguous log entries on byte-addressable PM to prevent GC in LFS. Specifically, SLOT scatters log entries across PM and manages them in a per-entry granularity, thereby enabling the immediate reallocation of invalidated entries and eliminating GC overheads. SLOT further introduces an array of techniques to exploit PM write buffer efficiency to fully unleash PM I/O performance potential. We implement SlotFS to realize the efficiency of SLOT. Experimental results driven by synthetic and real-world workloads show that SlotFS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art PM file systems. Compared to two representative PM LFSes, NOVA and MadFS, SlotFS achieves 27%-47% and 59%-175% performance improvement under a series of real-world workloads.
papers.abstract_zh:
日志结构文件系统 (LFS) 因其高写入性能和轻量级崩溃一致性协议而成为持久内存 (PM) 的流行选择。然而，即使使用 PM 的字节可寻址 I/O 接口，现有的 PM LFS 仍然为日志局部性维护连续的空间，同时使用大量垃圾收集 (GC) 同步回收空间，导致 PM 上的 I/O 性能下降高达 50%。因此，LFS的连续空间管理（引发GC）和PM的非连续字节寻址之间存在最后一英里问题。

为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种称为 SLOT 的新型分散测井技术。核心思想是有效管理字节可寻址PM上的非连续日志条目，以防止LFS中的GC。具体来说，SLOT 将日志条目分散在 PM 中，并以每个条目的粒度对其进行管理，从而能够立即重新分配无效条目并消除 GC 开销。 SLOT 进一步引入了一系列技术来利用 PM 写入缓冲区效率来充分释放 PM I/O 性能潜力。我们实现SlotFS来实现SLOT的效率。由合成和真实工作负载驱动的实验结果表明，SlotFS 的性能显着优于最先进的 PM 文件系统。与两种代表性的 PM LFS NOVA 和 MadFS 相比，SlotFS 在一系列实际工作负载下分别实现了 27%-47% 和 59%-175% 的性能提升。

papers.title: ParallelEVM: Operation-Level Concurrent Transaction Execution for EVM-Compatible Blockchains.
papers.abstract:
Blockchain systems, especially EVM-compatible ones that serially execute transactions, face a significant limitation in throughput. One promising solution is concurrent transaction execution, which accelerates transaction processing and increases the overall throughput. However, existing concurrency control algorithms fail to obtain adequate speedups in high-contention blockchain workloads, primarily due to their transaction-level conflict resolution strategies.

This paper introduces a novel operation-level concurrency control algorithm tailored for blockchains. The crux of our approach is to ensure that only operations depending on conflicts are executed serially, while permitting concurrent execution of the remaining conflict-free operations. In contrast to conventional approaches that either block or abort an entire transaction upon detecting conflicts, our algorithm integrates a redo phase that identifies and re-executes conflicting operations. To facilitate this, we propose the SSA (static single-assignment) operation log, a mechanism to trace operation dependencies, thereby enabling precise conflict identification and efficient re-execution. Our prototype, ParallelEVM, is evaluated using real-world Ethereum blocks. Experimental results show that ParallelEVM achieves an average speedup of 4.28×, a marked improvement over the 2.49× speedup achieved by optimistic concurrency control.
papers.abstract_zh:
区块链系统，尤其是串行执行交易的 EVM 兼容系统，在吞吐量方面面临着重大限制。一种有前途的解决方案是并发事务执行，它可以加速事务处理并提高总体吞吐量。然而，现有的并发控制算法无法在高争用的区块链工作负载中获得足够的加速，这主要是由于其事务级冲突解决策略。

本文介绍了一种专为区块链量身定制的新型操作级并发控制算法。我们方法的关键是确保仅串行执行依赖于冲突的操作，同时允许并发执行剩余的无冲突操作。与在检测到冲突时阻止或中止整个事务的传统方法相比，我们的算法集成了重做阶段，可以识别并重新执行冲突操作。为了实现这一点，我们提出了SSA（静态单分配）操作日志，这是一种跟踪操作依赖关系的机制，从而实现精确的冲突识别和高效的重新执行。我们的原型 ParallelEVM 使用现实世界的以太坊区块进行评估。实验结果表明，ParallelEVM 平均加速比为 4.28 倍，比乐观并发控制的 2.49 倍加速比有显着提升。

papers.title: Pegasus: Transparent and Unified Kernel-Bypass Networking for Fast Local and Remote Communication.
papers.abstract:
Modern software architectures in cloud computing are highly reliant on interconnected local and remote services. Popular architectures, such as the service mesh, rely on the use of independent services or sidecars for a single application. While such modular approaches simplify application development and deployment, they also introduce significant communication overhead since now even local communication that is handled by the kernel becomes a performance bottleneck. This problem has been identified and partially solved for remote communication over fast NICs through the use of kernel-bypass data plane systems. However, existing kernel-bypass mechanisms challenge their practical deployment by either requiring code modification or supporting only a small subset of the network interface.

In this paper, we propose Pegasus, a framework for transparent kernel bypass for local and remote communication. By transparently fusing multiple applications into a single process, Pegasus provides an in-process fast path to bypass the kernel for local communication. To accelerate remote communication over fast NICs, Pegasus uses DPDK to directly access the NIC. Pegasus supports transparent kernel bypass for unmodified binaries by implementing core OS services in user space, such as scheduling and memory management, thus removing the kernel from the critical path. Our experiments on a range of real-world applications show that, compared with Linux, Pegasus improves the throughput by 19% to 33% for local communication and 178% to 442% for remote communication, without application changes. Furthermore, Pegasus achieves 222% higher throughput than Linux for co-located, IO-intensive applications that require both local and remote communication, with each communication optimization contributing significantly.
papers.abstract_zh:
云计算中的现代软件架构高度依赖互连的本地和远程服务。流行的架构（例如服务网格）依赖于单个应用程序使用独立服务或 sidecar。虽然这种模块化方法简化了应用程序开发和部署，但它们也引入了显着的通信开销，因为现在即使由内核处理的本地通信也成为性能瓶颈。通过使用内核旁路数据平面系统，通过快速 NIC 进行远程通信时，已发现并部分解决了该问题。然而，现有的内核绕过机制需要修改代码或仅支持网络接口的一小部分，从而对它们的实际部署提出了挑战。

在本文中，我们提出了 Pegasus，一种用于本地和远程通信的透明内核旁路框架。通过透明地将多个应用程序融合到单个进程中，Pegasus 提供了一种绕过内核进行本地通信的进程内快速路径。为了加速快速 NIC 上的远程通信，Pegasus 使用 DPDK 直接访问 NIC。 Pegasus 通过在用户空间中实现核心操作系统服务（例如调度和内存管理）来支持对未修改的二进制文件的透明内核旁路，从而将内核从关键路径中删除。我们对一系列实际应用程序的实验表明，与 Linux 相比，Pegasus 在不更改应用程序的情况下，本地通信的吞吐量提高了 19% 至 33%，远程通信的吞吐量提高了 178% 至 442%。此外，对于需要本地和远程通信的协同定位、IO 密集型应用程序，Pegasus 的吞吐量比 Linux 高出 222%，并且每种通信优化都做出了显着贡献。

papers.title: PET: Proactive Demotion for Efficient Tiered Memory Management.
papers.abstract:
Tiered memory is a promising approach for increasing main-memory capacity at a lower cost by using DRAM as the upper tier (fast memory) and slower-but-cheap byte-addressable memory as the lower tier (slow memory). A proactive demotion, one of the ways to use tiered memory efficiently, demotes cold data to slow memory even when fast memory has sufficient free space. Prior works have utilized proactive demotion to reduce the high cost of main memory by reducing applications' resident set size in fast memory. Further, proactive demotion helps mitigate severe performance degradation caused by fast memory shortages when there is a spike in demand for hot data. Still, we observe that leveraging memory access locality within the allocation units of applications enables larger fast-memory savings with lower system overhead.

We propose a new proactive demotion scheme, PET, which performs proactive demotion for efficient tiered memory management. PET proposes extending the unit of demotion and promotion from the OS page, adopted by prior works, to PET-block (P-block), which reflects the unit in which applications allocate memory. We also provide the mechanisms that carefully select the demotion target P-block and swiftly promote the demoted P-block when the access pattern changes. The prototype of PET on Linux kernel v6.1.44 reduces 39.8% (up to 80.4%) of fast-memory usage with only a 1.7% performance drop on average of the evaluated workloads. Also, it mitigates 31% performance slowdown compared to the default Linux kernel when the system's memory usage is larger than fast-memory capacity, which outperforms state-of-the-art schemes for tiered memory management.
papers.abstract_zh:
分层内存是一种很有前途的方法，通过使用 DRAM 作为上层（快速内存），使用较慢但便宜的字节可寻址内存作为下层（慢速内存），以较低的成本增加主内存容量。主动降级是有效使用分层内存的方法之一，即使快速内存有足够的可用空间，也会将冷数据降级为慢速内存。先前的工作已经利用主动降级来通过减少应用程序在快速存储器中的驻留集大小来降低主存储器的高成本。此外，当热数据需求激增时，主动降级有助于缓解由于快速内存短缺而导致的严重性能下降。尽管如此，我们仍然观察到，利用应用程序分配单元内的内存访问局部性可以以更低的系统开销实现更大的快速内存节省。

我们提出了一种新的主​​动降级方案 PET，它执行主动降级以实现高效的分层内存管理。 PET提出将降级和升级的单位从先前作品采用的操作系统页面扩展到PET块（P块），它反映了应用程序分配内存的单位。我们还提供了仔细选择降级目标 P 块的机制，并在访问模式发生变化时快速提升降级的 P 块。 Linux 内核 v6.1.44 上的 PET 原型减少了 39.8%（高达 80.4%）的快速内存使用，而评估的工作负载平均性能仅下降 1.7%。此外，当系统内存使用量大于快速内存容量时，与默认 Linux 内核相比，它可以缓解 31% 的性能下降，这优于分层内存管理的最先进方案。

papers.title: Phantom: Virtualizing Switch Register Resources for Accurate Sketch-based Network Measurement.
papers.abstract:
Sketches have proven to be useful for measuring traffic. They store measurement results in the registers of data plane switches. However, they suffer from the short of switch register resources, limiting their measurement accuracy.

We propose Phantom, a framework that virtualizes register resources on programmable switches. We observe that in addition to original register resources, switches also offer the capability of data recirculation. Such a capability can be utilized to store some measurement data of sketches, enabling Phantom to realize virtual registers. We realize this insight by building Phantom on a 64x100 Gbps Tofino switch. Our testbed experiments indicate that Phantom can virtualize O(106) registers under Tbps-level traffic, which brings up to 86% accuracy improvement to sketches.
papers.abstract_zh:
事实证明，草图对于测量流量非常有用。它们将测量结果存储在数据平面交换机的寄存器中。然而，它们缺乏开关寄存器资源，限制了它们的测量精度。

我们提出了 Phantom，一个虚拟化可编程交换机上的寄存器资源的框架。我们观察到，除了原有的寄存器资源之外，交换机还提供了数据循环的能力。这种能力可以用来存储草图的一些测量数据，使Phantom能够实现虚拟寄存器。我们通过在 64x100 Gbps Tofino 交换机上构建 Phantom 来实现这一见解。我们的测试床实验表明，Phantom 可以在 Tbps 级别的流量下虚拟化 O(106) 个寄存器，这为 sketch 带来高达 86% 的准确率提升。

papers.title: Pre-Stores: Proactive Software-guided Movement of Data Down the Memory Hierarchy.
papers.abstract:
We introduce the notion of software pre-storing - the converse of software prefetching. With software pre-fetching, instructions are inserted in the code to asynchronously move data up in the memory hierarchy. With software pre-storing, instructions are inserted to direct the CPU to asynchronously move data down in the memory hierarchy. Pre-storing can be implemented by using existing processor instructions.

Software pre-storing provides performance benefits for write-heavy applications, especially with emerging architectures that incorporate memories with diverse characteristics such as, for instance, remote DRAM accessed via a CXL switch or nonvolatile PMEM memory. We identify application scenarios in which software pre-storing is beneficial, and we have developed a tool, DirtBuster, that identifies applications and code regions that can benefit from pre-storing.

We evaluate the concept of software pre-storing and the DirtBuster tool on two CPU architectures (ARM and x86) and two types of cacheable memories (PMEM and cache-coherent DRAM accessed through an FPGA). We demonstrate performance improvements for key-value stores, HPC applications, message passing, and Tensorflow, by up to 2.3x.
papers.abstract_zh:
我们引入软件预存储的概念——软件预取的逆过程。通过软件预取，指令被插入到代码中以异步地将数据在存储器层次结构中向上移动。通过软件预存储，插入指令来指导CPU在存储器层次结构中异步地向下移动数据。预存储可以利用现有的处理器指令来实现。

软件预存储为写入量大的应用程序提供了性能优势，特别是对于包含具有不同特性的存储器的新兴架构，例如通过 CXL 开关访问的远程 DRAM 或非易失性 PMEM 存储器。我们确定了软件预存储有益的应用场景，并开发了一个工具 DirtBuster，它可以识别可以从预存储中受益的应用程序和代码区域。

我们在两种 CPU 架构（ARM 和 x86）和两种类型的可缓存存储器（PMEM 和通过 FPGA 访问的缓存一致性 DRAM）上评估软件预存储的概念和 DirtBuster 工具。我们展示了键值存储、HPC 应用程序、消息传递和 Tensorflow 的性能提升高达 2.3 倍。

papers.title: Rakis: Secure Fast I/O Primitives Across Trust Boundaries on Intel SGX.
papers.abstract: The use of Intel® Software Guard Extensions (SGX) offers robust security measures for shielding applications in untrusted environments. However, the performance overhead experienced by IO-intensive applications within SGX limits widespread adoption. Prior approaches have proposed the use of userspace kernel-bypass libraries such as Data Plane Development Kit (DPDK) inside SGX enclaves to enable direct access to IO devices. However, these solutions often come at the cost of increasing the Trusted Computing Base (TCB) size, expanding the attack surface, and complicating deployment. In this paper, we introduce Rakis, a comprehensive system that securely enables SGX enclave programs to leverage fast IO Linux kernel primitives without modifying user applications. Rakis prioritizes the security of its TCB components by employing rigorous software testing and verification methods, embodying a security-by-design approach. Importantly, Rakis achieves performance advantages without sacrificing TCB size or introducing deployment intricacies and demonstrates significant improvements in benchmark tests with a 4.6x increase in UDP network throughput compared to state-of-the-art SGX enclave LibOS (Gramine-SGX). To demonstrate the practical applicability of Rakis, we evaluate its performance on four real-world programs showcasing an average performance improvement of 2.8x compared to Gramine-SGX across all workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 英特尔® Software Guard Extensions (SGX) 的使用提供了强大的安全措施，可在不受信任的环境中保护应用程序。然而，SGX 内 IO 密集型应用程序所经历的性能开销限制了广泛采用。先前的方法建议在 SGX enclave 内使用用户空间内核旁路库，例如数据平面开发套件 (DPDK)，以实现对 IO 设备的直接访问。然而，这些解决方案通常以增加可信计算库 (TCB) 规模、扩大攻击面和使部署复杂化为代价。在本文中，我们介绍了 Rakis，这是一个综合系统，可以安全地使 SGX enclave 程序利用快速 IO Linux 内核原语，而无需修改用户应用程序。 Rakis 通过采用严格的软件测试和验证方法，体现安全设计方法，优先考虑 TCB 组件的安全性。重要的是，Rakis 在不牺牲 TCB 大小或引入复杂部署的情况下实现了性能优势，并且在基准测试中表现出显着改进，与最先进的 SGX enclave LibOS (Gramine-SGX) 相比，UDP 网络吞吐量提高了 4.6 倍。为了证明 Rakis 的实际适用性，我们在四个实际程序中评估了它的性能，结果表明，与 Gramine-SGX 相比，所有工作负载的平均性能提高了 2.8 倍。

papers.title: Revealing the Unstable Foundations of eBPF-Based Kernel Extensions.
papers.abstract: eBPF programs significantly enhance kernel capabilities, but encounter substantial compatibility challenges due to their deep integration with unstable kernel internals. We introduce DepSurf, a tool that identifies dependency mismatches between eBPF programs and kernel images. Our analysis of 25 kernel images spanning 8 years reveals that dependency mismatches are pervasive, stemming from kernel source code evolution, diverse configuration options, and intricate compilation processes. We apply DepSurf to 53 real-world eBPF programs, and find that 83% are impacted by dependency mismatches, underscoring the urgent need for systematic dependency analysis. By identifying these mismatches, DepSurf enables a more robust development and maintenance process for eBPF programs, enhancing their reliability across a wide range of kernels.
papers.abstract_zh: eBPF 程序显着增强了内核功能，但由于它们与不稳定的内核内部深度集成，因此遇到了巨大的兼容性挑战。我们引入了 DepSurf，这是一个识别 eBPF 程序和内核映像之间依赖关系不匹配的工具。我们对跨越 8 年的 25 个内核映像的分析表明，依赖项不匹配非常普遍，这源于内核源代码的演变、多样化的配置选项和复杂的编译过程。我们将 DepSurf 应用于 53 个现实世界的 eBPF 程序，发现 83% 受到依赖项不匹配的影响，这凸显了系统依赖项分析的迫切需要。通过识别这些不匹配，DepSurf 为 eBPF 程序提供了更强大的开发和维护流程，从而增强了它们在各种内核中的可靠性。

papers.title: RoboRebound: Multi-Robot System Defense with Bounded-Time Interaction.
papers.abstract:
Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) is a classic technique for defending distributed systems against a wide range of faults and attacks. However, existing solutions are designed for systems where nodes can interact only by exchanging messages. They are not directly applicable to systems where nodes have sensors and actuators and can also interact in the physical world - perhaps by blocking each other's path or by crashing into each other.

In this paper, we take a first stab at extending BFT to this larger class of systems. We focus on multi-robot systems (MRS), an emerging technology that is increasingly being deployed for applications such as target tracking, warehouse logistics, and exploration. An MRS can consist of dozens of interacting robots and is thus a bona-fide distributed system. The classic masking guarantee is not practical in a MRS, but we propose a variant called bounded-time interaction that can be implemented, and we present an algorithm that achieves it, in combination with a few small hardware tweaks. We built a simulator and prototyped wheeled robots to show that our algorithm is effective, and that it has a reasonable overhead.
papers.abstract_zh:
拜占庭容错（BFT）是一种保护分布式系统免受各种故障和攻击的经典技术。然而，现有的解决方案是为节点只能通过交换消息进行交互的系统而设计的。它们并不直接适用于节点具有传感器和执行器的系统，并且还可以在物理世界中进行交互——可能通过阻塞彼此的路径或相互碰撞。

在本文中，我们首次尝试将 BFT 扩展到此类更大的系统。我们专注于多机器人系统 (MRS)，这是一种新兴技术，越来越多地应用于目标跟踪、仓库物流和勘探等应用。 MRS 可以由数十个交互机器人组成，因此是一个真正的分布式系统。经典的屏蔽保证在 MRS 中并不实用，但我们提出了一种可以实现的称为有限时间交互的变体，并且我们提出了一种结合一些小的硬件调整来实现它的算法。我们构建了一个模拟器和原型轮式机器人，以证明我们的算法是有效的，并且具有合理的开销。

papers.title: Samoyeds: Accelerating MoE Models with Structured Sparsity Leveraging Sparse Tensor Cores.
papers.abstract:
The escalating size of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) based Large Language Models (LLMs) presents significant computational and memory challenges, necessitating innovative solutions to enhance efficiency without compromising model accuracy. Structured sparsity emerges as a compelling strategy to address these challenges by leveraging the emerging sparse computing hardware. Prior works mainly focus on the sparsity in model parameters, neglecting the inherent sparse patterns in activations. This oversight can lead to additional computational costs associated with activations, potentially resulting in suboptimal performance.

This paper presents Samoyeds, an innovative acceleration system for MoE LLMs utilizing Sparse Tensor Cores (SpTCs). Samoyeds is the first to apply sparsity simultaneously to both activations and model parameters. It introduces a bespoke sparse data format tailored for MoE computation and develops a specialized sparse-sparse matrix multiplication kernel. Furthermore, Samoyeds incorporates systematic optimizations specifically designed for the execution of dual-side structured sparse MoE LLMs on SpTCs, further enhancing system performance. Evaluations show that Samoyeds outperforms SOTA works by up to 1.99× at the kernel level and 1.58× at the model level. Moreover, it enhances memory efficiency, increasing maximum supported batch sizes by 4.41× on average. Additionally, Samoyeds surpasses existing SOTA structured sparse solutions in both model accuracy and hardware portability.
papers.abstract_zh:
基于专家混合 (MoE) 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 的规模不断扩大，带来了巨大的计算和内存挑战，需要创新的解决方案来提高效率而不影响模型的准确性。结构化稀疏性成为一种引人注目的策略，可以利用新兴的稀疏计算硬件来应对这些挑战。先前的工作主要关注模型参数的稀疏性，忽略了激活中固有的稀疏模式。这种疏忽可能会导致与激活相关的额外计算成本，从而可能导致性能不佳。

本文介绍了 Samoyeds，这是一种利用稀疏张量核心 (SpTC) 的 MoE LLM 创新加速系统。 Samoyeds 是第一个将稀疏性同时应用于激活和模型参数的人。它引入了专为 MoE 计算定制的稀疏数据格式，并开发了专门的稀疏-稀疏矩阵乘法内核。此外，Samoyeds 还采用了专为在 SpTC 上执行双面结构化稀疏 MoE LLM 而设计的系统优化，进一步增强了系统性能。评估表明，Samoyeds 在内核级别的性能比 SOTA 的性能高出 1.99 倍，在模型级别的性能高出 1.58 倍。此外，它还提高了内存效率，将支持的最大批量大小平均增加了 4.41 倍。此外，Samoyeds 在模型精度和硬件可移植性方面都超越了现有的 SOTA 结构化稀疏解决方案。

papers.title: Seal: Towards Diverse Specification Inference for Linux Interfaces from Security Patches.
papers.abstract:
Linux utilizes interfaces as communication protocols across different subsystems while ensuring manageability. These interfaces standardize interactions between various subsystems; however, the absence of complete calling contexts can result in the mishandling of data from other entities, i.e., interaction data, thus incurring vulnerabilities. Even worse, the effectiveness of static bug detectors could be severely hindered due to the lack of interface specifications. Previous solutions, seeking to automate the inference of interface specifications, are tailored to a subset of the interaction data behavior and, hence are deficient in generalizability.

This research presents Seal, a framework that leverages security patches to achieve the automatic inference of diverse interface specifications. Those specifications, formulated as value-flow properties, could adeptly characterize interaction data behaviors for individual interfaces and the synergistic relationships among multiple interfaces. Technically, Seal assesses the impact of code changes in program dependencies, abstracts specifications from changed value-flow paths, and detects bugs via reachability analysis. Experiments show Seal attains a precision of 71.9% and the specifications could accommodate various bug types. We utilized Seal to identify 167 unseen bugs in Linux, hidden for an average of 7.7 years. So far, 95 of them are confirmed by Linux maintainers, 56 of which fixed by our patches.
papers.abstract_zh:
Linux 利用接口作为不同子系统之间的通信协议，同时确保可管理性。这些接口标准化了各个子系统之间的交互；然而，缺乏完整的调用上下文可能会导致对来自其他实体的数据（即交互数据）的错误处理，从而导致漏洞。更糟糕的是，由于缺乏接口规范，静态错误检测器的有效性可能会受到严重阻碍。以前的解决方案寻求自动化接口规范的推断，是针对交互数据行为的子集定制的，因此缺乏通用性。

这项研究提出了 Seal，这是一个利用安全补丁实现不同接口规范自动推断的框架。这些规范被表述为价值流属性，可以熟练地描述各个接口的交互数据行为以及多个接口之间的协同关系。从技术上讲，Seal 评估程序依赖项中代码更改的影响，从更改的价值流路径中提取规范，并通过可达性分析检测错误。实验表明，Seal 的精度达到 71.9%，规格可以适应各种错误类型。我们利用 Seal 识别出 Linux 中 167 个看不见的错误，平均隐藏了 7.7 年。到目前为止，其中 95 个已得到 Linux 维护者的确认，其中 56 个已由我们的补丁修复。

papers.title: SeBS-Flow: Benchmarking Serverless Cloud Function Workflows.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing has emerged as a prominent paradigm, with a significant adoption rate among cloud customers. While this model offers advantages such as abstraction from the deployment and resource scheduling, it also poses limitations in handling complex use cases due to the restricted nature of individual functions. Serverless workflows address this limitation by orchestrating multiple functions into a cohesive application. However, existing serverless workflow platforms exhibit significant differences in their programming models and infrastructure, making fair and consistent performance evaluations difficult in practice. To address this gap, we propose the first serverless workflow benchmarking suite SeBS-Flow, providing a platform-agnostic workflow model that enables consistent benchmarking across various platforms. SeBS-Flow includes six real-world application benchmarks and four microbenchmarks representing different computational patterns. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on three major cloud platforms, assessing performance, cost, scalability, and runtime deviations. We make our benchmark suite open-source, enabling rigorous and comparable evaluations of serverless workflows over time. Implementation: https://github.com/spcl/serverless-benchmarks Artifact: https://github.com/spcl/sebs-flow-artifact
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算已成为一种突出的范例，在云客户中具有显着的采用率。虽然该模型具有从部署和资源调度中进行抽象等优点，但由于各个功能的限制性质，它在处理复杂用例方面也存在局限性。无服务器工作流程通过将多个功能编排到一个内聚的应用程序中来解决此限制。然而，现有的无服务器工作流平台在编程模型和基础设施方面存在显着差异，这使得在实践中难以进行公平一致的性能评估。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了第一个无服务器工作流基准测试套件 SeBS-Flow，提供了一个与平台无关的工作流模型，可以跨不同平台进行一致的基准测试。 SeBS-Flow 包括六个实际应用程序基准和四个代表不同计算模式的微基准。我们对三大云平台进行综合评估，评估性能、成本、可扩展性和运行时偏差。我们将基准套件开源，以便随着时间的推移对无服务器工作流程进行严格且可比较的评估。实现：https://github.com/spcl/serverless-benchmarks 工件：https://github.com/spcl/sebs-flow-artifact

papers.title: Serverless Cold Starts and Where to Find Them.
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes a month-long trace of 85 billion user requests and 11.9 million cold starts from Huawei's serverless cloud platform. Our analysis spans workloads from five data centers. We focus on cold starts and provide a comprehensive examination of the underlying factors influencing the number and duration of cold starts. These factors include trigger types, request synchronicity, runtime languages, and function resource allocations. We investigate components of cold starts, including pod allocation time, code and dependency deployment time, and scheduling delays, and examine their relationships with runtime languages, trigger types, and resource allocation. We introduce pod utility ratio to measure the pod's useful lifetime relative to its cold start time, giving a more complete picture of cold starts, and see that some pods with long cold start times have longer useful lifetimes. Our findings reveal the complexity and multifaceted origins of the number, duration, and characteristics of cold starts, driven by differences in trigger types, runtime languages, and function resource allocations. For example, cold starts in Region 1 take up to 7 seconds, dominated by dependency deployment time and scheduling. In Region 2, cold starts take up to 3 seconds and are dominated by pod allocation time. Based on this, we identify opportunities to reduce the number and duration of cold starts using strategies for multi-region scheduling. Finally, we suggest directions for future research to address these challenges and enhance the performance of serverless cloud platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文分析了华为无服务器云平台长达一个月的850亿次用户请求和1190万次冷启动的跟踪。我们的分析涵盖五个数据中心的工作负载。我们专注于冷启动，并对影响冷启动次数和持续时间的潜在因素进行全面检查。这些因素包括触发器类型、请求同步性、运行时语言和函数资源分配。我们研究了冷启动的组成部分，包括 Pod 分配时间、代码和依赖项部署时间以及调度延迟，并检查它们与运行时语言、触发器类型和资源分配的关系。我们引入 Pod 利用率来衡量 Pod 相对于其冷启动时间的使用寿命，从而更全面地了解冷启动情况，并发现一些冷启动时间较长的 Pod 具有更长的使用寿命。我们的研究结果揭示了冷启动的数量、持续时间和特征的复杂性和多方面起源，这是由触发器类型、运行时语言和函数资源分配的差异驱动的。例如，区域 1 中的冷启动最多需要 7 秒，主要取决于依赖项部署时间和调度。在区域 2 中，冷启动最多需要 3 秒，并且主要由 Pod 分配时间决定。基于此，我们找到了使用多区域调度策略来减少冷启动次数和持续时间的机会。最后，我们提出了未来研究的方向，以应对这些挑战并提高无服务器云平台的性能。

papers.title: SkyServe: Serving AI Models across Regions and Clouds with Spot Instances.
papers.abstract:
Recent years have witnessed an explosive growth of AI models. The high cost of hosting AI services on GPUs and their demanding service requirements, make it timely and challenging to lower service costs and guarantee service quality. While spot instances have long been offered with a large discount, spot preemptions have discouraged users from using them to host model replicas when serving AI models.

To address this, we propose a simple yet efficient policy, SpotHedge, that leverages spot replicas across different failure domains (e.g., regions and clouds) to ensure availability, lower costs, and high service quality. SpotHedge intelligently spreads spot replicas across different regions and clouds to improve availability and reduce correlated preemptions, over-provisions cheap spot replicas than required as a safeguard against possible preemptions, and dynamically falls back to on-demand replicas when spot replicas become unavailable. We built SkyServe, a system leveraging SpotHedge to efficiently serve AI models over a mixture of spot and on-demand replicas across regions and clouds. We compared SkyServe with both research and production systems on real AI workloads: SkyServe reduces cost by 43% on average while achieving high resource availability compared to using on-demand replicas. Additionally, SkyServe improves P50, P90, and P99 latency by 2.3×, 2.1×, 2.1× on average compared to other research and production systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
近年来，人工智能模型呈爆炸式增长。由于人工智能服务托管在GPU上的成本较高，且服务要求较高，降低服务成本和保证服务质量面临着及时性和挑战性。虽然现货实例长期以来一直以很大的折扣提供，但现货抢占阻止了用户在服务人工智能模型时使用它们来托管模型副本。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的策略 SpotHedge，它利用跨不同故障域（例如区域和云）的现货副本来确保可用性、更低的成本和更高的服务质量。 SpotHedge 智能地将现货副本分布在不同的区域和云中，以提高可用性并减少相关抢占，超额供应比所需的便宜的现货副本，以防止可能的抢占，并在现货副本不可用时动态回退到按需副本。我们构建了 SkyServe，这是一个利用 SpotHedge 的系统，通过跨区域和云的现货和按需副本的混合方式高效地提供 AI 模型。我们将 SkyServe 与真实 AI 工作负载的研究和生产系统进行了比较：与使用按需副本相比，SkyServe 平均降低了 43% 的成本，同时实现了较高的资源可用性。此外，与其他研究和生产系统相比，SkyServe 将 P50、P90 和 P99 延迟平均提高了 2.3 倍、2.1 倍、2.1 倍。

papers.title: Solid State Drive Targeted Memory-Efficient Indexing for Universal I/O Patterns and Fragmentation Degrees.
papers.abstract: Thanks to the advance of device scaling technologies, the capacity of SSDs is rapidly increasing. Such increase, however, comes at the cost of a huge index table requiring large DRAM. To provide reasonable performance with less DRAM, various index structures exploiting locality and regularity of I/O references have been proposed. However, they provide deteriorated performance depending on I/O patterns and storage fragmentation. This paper proposes a novel approximate index structure, called AppL, which combines memory-efficient approximate indices and an LSM-tree that has an append-only and sorted nature. AppL reduces the index size to 6-8-bits per entry, which is considerably smaller than the typical index structures requiring 32-64-bits, and maintains such high memory efficiency irrespective of locality and fragmentation. By alleviating memory pressure, AppL achieves 33.6-72.4% shorter read latency and 28.4%-83.4% higher I/O throughput than state-of-the-art techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于设备扩展技术的进步，SSD的容量正在迅速增加。然而，这种增加是以需要大量 DRAM 的巨大索引表为代价的。为了用更少的 DRAM 提供合理的性能，已经提出了利用 I/O 引用的局部性和规律性的各种索引结构。然而，它们的性能会因 I/O 模式和存储碎片而降低。本文提出了一种新颖的近似索引结构，称为 AppL，它结合了内存高效的近似索引和具有仅追加和排序性质的 LSM 树。 AppL 将索引大小减少到每个条目 6-8 位，这比需要 32-64 位的典型索引结构要小得多，并且无论局部性和碎片如何，都可以保持如此高的内存效率。通过减轻内存压力，AppL 与最先进的技术相比，读取延迟缩短了 33.6-72.4%，I/O 吞吐量提高了 28.4%-83.4%。

papers.title: SpaceFusion: Advanced Deep Learning Operator Fusion via Space-Mapping Graph.
papers.abstract: This work proposes SpaceFusion, an advanced scheduler for efficient deep learning operator fusion. First, we develop a novel abstraction, the Space-Mapping Graph (SMG), to holistically model the spatial information of both inter- and intra-operator dependencies. Subsequently, we introduce the spatial and temporal slicers to decompose the fused spaces defined in SMGs, generating fusion schedules by analyzing and transforming dependencies. Finally, we present auto-scheduling methods that use the slicers to automatically create high-performance fusion schedules tailored to specific hardware resource configurations. End-to-end performance evaluations reveal that SpaceFusion achieves up to 8.79x speedup (3.54x on average) over baseline implementations from Huggingface for Transformer models, and a maximum of 2.21x speedup compared to the state-of-the-art manually-tuned implementations powered by FlashAttention.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了 SpaceFusion，一种用于高效深度学习算子融合的高级调度程序。首先，我们开发了一种新颖的抽象，即空间映射图（SMG），以对运算符间和运算符内依赖性的空间信息进行整体建模。随后，我们引入空间和时间切片器来分解 SMG 中定义的融合空间，通过分析和转换依赖关系生成融合调度。最后，我们提出了自动调度方法，使用切片器自动创建适合特定硬件资源配置的高性能融合调度。端到端性能评估表明，与 Huggingface 的 Transformer 模型基准实现相比，SpaceFusion 实现了高达 8.79 倍的加速（平均 3.54 倍），与由 FlashAttention 支持的最先进的手动调整实现相比，最多实现了 2.21 倍的加速。

papers.title: SpInfer: Leveraging Low-Level Sparsity for Efficient Large Language Model Inference on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but their immense scale poses significant challenges in terms of both memory and computational costs. While unstructured pruning offers promising solutions by introducing sparsity to reduce resource requirements, realizing its benefits in LLM inference remains elusive. This is primarily due to the storage overhead of indexing non-zero elements and the inefficiency of sparse matrix multiplication (SpMM) kernels at low sparsity levels (around 50%). In this paper, we present SpInfer, a high-performance framework tailored for sparsified LLM inference on GPUs. SpInfer introduces Tensor-Core-Aware Bitmap Encoding (TCA-BME), a novel sparse format that minimizes indexing overhead by leveraging efficient bitmap-based indexing, optimized for GPU Tensor Core architectures. Furthermore, SpInfer integrates an optimized SpMM kernel with Shared Memory Bitmap Decoding (SMBD) and asynchronous pipeline design to enhance computational efficiency. Experimental results show that SpInfer significantly outperforms state-of-the-art SpMM implementations (up to 2.14× and 2.27× over Flash-LLM and SparTA, respectively) across a range of sparsity levels (30% to 70%), with substantial improvements in both memory efficiency and end-to-end inference speed (up to 1.58×). SpInfer outperforms highly optimized cuBLAS at sparsity levels as low as 30%, marking the first effective translation of unstructured pruning's theoretical advantages into practical performance gains for LLM inference.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 已展现出非凡的功能，但其巨大的规模在内存和计算成本方面提出了重大挑战。虽然非结构化剪枝通过引入稀疏性来减少资源需求，提供了有前途的解决方案，但实现其在 LLM 推理中的好处仍然难以实现。这主要是由于索引非零元素的存储开销以及稀疏矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 内核在低稀疏级别（大约 50%）下的低效率。在本文中，我们提出了 SpInfer，这是一个专为 GPU 上的稀疏 LLM 推理而定制的高性能框架。 SpInfer 推出了 Tensor-Core-Aware 位图编码 (TCA-BME)，这是一种新颖的稀疏格式，它通过利用高效的基于位图的索引来最大限度地减少索引开销，并针对 GPU Tensor Core 架构进行了优化。此外，SpInfer将优化的SpMM内核与共享内存位图解码（SMBD）和异步管道设计集成在一起，以提高计算效率。实验结果表明，SpInfer 在一系列稀疏级别（30% 到 70%）上显着优于最先进的 SpMM 实现（分别比 Flash-LLM 和 SparTA 提高了 2.14 倍和 2.27 倍），并且内存效率和端到端推理速度都得到了显着改进（高达 1.58 倍）。 SpInfer 在稀疏度水平低至 30% 时优于高度优化的 cuBLAS，这标志着非结构化剪枝的理论优势首次有效转化为 LLM 推理的实际性能增益。

papers.title: Stateful Large Language Model Serving with Pensieve.
papers.abstract:
Large Language Models (LLMs) are wildly popular today and it is important to serve them efficiently. Existing LLM serving systems are stateless across requests. Consequently, when LLMs are used in the common setting of multi-turn conversations, a growing log of the conversation history must be processed alongside any request by the serving system at each turn, resulting in repeated processing.

In this paper, we design Pensieve, a system optimized for multi-turn conversation LLM serving. Pensieve maintains the conversation state across requests by caching previously processed history to avoid duplicate processing. Pensieve's multi-tier caching strategy can utilize both GPU and CPU memory to efficiently store and retrieve cached data. Pensieve also generalizes the recent PagedAttention kernel to support attention between multiple input tokens with a GPU cache spread over non-contiguous memory. Our evaluation shows that Pensieve can achieve 1.14-3.0× the throughput of vLLM and TensorRT-LLM and significantly reduce latency.
papers.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 如今非常流行，有效地为它们提供服务非常重要。现有的 LLM 服务系统在请求之间是无状态的。因此，当 LLM 用于多轮对话的常见设置时，每次服务系统必须处理不断增长的对话历史记录以及任何请求，从而导致重复处理。

在本文中，我们设计了 Pensieve，这是一个针对多轮对话 LLM 服务进行优化的系统。 Pensieve 通过缓存先前处理的历史记录来维护跨请求的对话状态，以避免重复处理。 Pensieve 的多层缓存策略可以利用 GPU 和 CPU 内存来有效地存储和检索缓存数据。 Pensieve 还概括了最近的 PagedAttention 内核，以支持多个输入令牌之间的注意力，并在非连续内存上分布 GPU 缓存。我们的评估表明，Pensieve 可以实现 vLLM 和 TensorRT-LLM 1.14-3.0 倍的吞吐量，并显着降低延迟。

papers.title: SuperFE: A Scalable and Flexible Feature Extractor for ML-based Traffic Analysis Applications.
papers.abstract: The feature extractor component in today's ML-based traffic analysis applications is becoming a key bottleneck. While mainstream software-based approaches can support flexible feature extraction, they fail to scale to multi-100Gbps network speed easily. Meanwhile, hardware-accelerated solutions can scale to high throughput, but cannot flexibly support generic traffic analysis applications. In this paper, we propose SuperFE, a feature extraction framework that allows users to extract traffic features efficiently and flexibly. SuperFE leverages the capabilities of both new-generation programmable switches and SmartNICs, with three key designs. First, SuperFE presents a user-friendly and extensible interface to support customized feature extraction policies, shielding underlying hardware implementation details and complexities. Second, SuperFE introduces a high-performance multi-granularity key-vector cache system in the programmable switches to batch necessary feature metadata for massive amounts of packets. Third, SuperFE exploits the multi-core parallel and hierarchical memory of SoC-based SmartNICs to achieve efficient feature computation with diverse streaming algorithms. Evaluations using our prototype demonstrate that SuperFE enables various state-of-the-art traffic analysis applications to efficiently extract features from multi-100Gbps raw traffic without compromising detection accuracy, and achieves nearly two orders of magnitude higher throughput than the software-based counterparts.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今基于机器学习的流量分析应用程序中的特征提取器组件正在成为一个关键瓶颈。虽然主流的基于软件的方法可以支持灵活的特征提取，但它们无法轻松扩展到 100Gbps 的网络速度。同时，硬件加速解决方案可以扩展到高吞吐量，但无法灵活支持通用流量分析应用。在本文中，我们提出了SuperFE，一种特征提取框架，允许用户高效、灵活地提取交通特征。 SuperFE 利用了新一代可编程交换机和 SmartNIC 的功能，具有三种关键设计。首先，SuperFE 提供了一个用户友好且可扩展的界面，以支持定制的特征提取策略，屏蔽底层硬件实现细节和复杂性。其次，SuperFE 在可编程交换机中引入了高性能多粒度键向量缓存系统，以批量处理大量数据包所需的功能元数据。第三，SuperFE 利用基于 SoC 的 SmartNIC 的多核并行和分层内存，通过多种流算法实现高效的特征计算。使用我们的原型进行的评估表明，SuperFE 使各种最先进的流量分析应用程序能够有效地从多 100Gbps 原始流量中提取特征，而不影响检测精度，并且与基于软件的同类产品相比，吞吐量提高了近两个数量级。

papers.title: T-MAC: CPU Renaissance via Table Lookup for Low-Bit LLM Deployment on Edge.
papers.abstract:
The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge devices is increasingly important to enhance on-device intelligence. Weight quantization is crucial for reducing the memory footprint of LLMs on devices. However, low-bit LLMs necessitate mixed precision matrix multiplication (mpGEMM) of low precision weights and high precision activations during inference. Existing systems, lacking native support for mpGEMM, resort to dequantize weights for high precision computation. Such an indirect way can lead to a significant inference overhead.

In this paper, we introduce T-MAC, an innovative lookup table(LUT)-based method designed for efficient low-bit LLM (i.e., weight-quantized LLM) inference on CPUs. T-MAC directly supports mpGEMM without dequantization, while simultaneously eliminating multiplications and reducing additions required. Specifically, T-MAC transforms the traditional data-type-centric multiplication to bit-wise table lookup, and enables a unified and scalable mpGEMM solution.

Our LUT-based kernels scale linearly to the weight bit-width. Evaluated on low-bit Llama and BitNet models, T-MAC demonstrates up to 4× increase in throughput and 70% reduction in energy consumption compared to llama.cpp. For BitNet-b1.58-3B, T-MAC delivers a token generation throughput of 30 tokens/s with a single core and 71 tokens/s with eight cores on M2-Ultra, and 11 tokens/s on Raspberry Pi 5. T-MAC with LUT-based computing paradigm, paves the way for the practical deployment of low-bit LLMs on resource-constrained edge devices without compromising computational efficiency. The system is open-sourced at https://github.com/microsoft/T-MAC.
papers.abstract_zh:
在边缘设备上部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 对于增强设备上的智能变得越来越重要。权重量化对于减少 LLM 在设备上的内存占用至关重要。然而，低位 LLM 需要在推理过程中进行低精度权重和高精度激活的混合精度矩阵乘法 (mpGEMM)。现有系统缺乏对 mpGEMM 的原生支持，只能通过去量化权重来实现高精度计算。这种间接的方式可能会导致显着的推理开销。

在本文中，我们介绍了 T-MAC，这是一种基于查找表 (LUT) 的创新方法，专为 CPU 上的高效低位 LLM（即权重量化 LLM）推理而设计。 T-MAC 直接支持 mpGEMM，无需反量化，同时消除乘法并减少所需的加法。具体来说，T-MAC 将传统的以数据类型为中心的乘法转换为按位表查找，并实现了统一且可扩展​​的 mpGEMM 解决方案。

我们基于 LUT 的内核与权重位宽线性缩放。在低位 Llama 和 BitNet 模型上进行评估，与 llama.cpp 相比，T-MAC 的吞吐量提高了 4 倍，能耗降低了 70%。对于 BitNet-b1.58-3B，T-MAC 在单核上的令牌生成吞吐量为 30 个令牌/秒，在 M2-Ultra 上的八核为 71 个令牌/秒，在 Raspberry Pi 5 上为 11 个令牌/秒。T-MAC 具有基于 LUT 的计算范式，为在资源有限的边缘设备上实际部署低位 LLM 铺平了道路，同时又不影响计算效率。该系统在 https://github.com/microsoft/T-MAC 上开源。

papers.title: Themis: Finding Imbalance Failures in Distributed File Systems via a Load Variance Model.
papers.abstract:
A distributed file system (DFS) is a file system that spans across multiple file servers or multiple locations. The load balancing mechanism in a DFS is crucial, as it optimizes resource utilization across all nodes and improves response times. However, incorrect load scheduling or implementation errors in load balancing algorithms can lead to system imbalance, hang-ups, and even crashes. Such imbalance failures may be critical and pose a significant threat to the availability and security of distributed file systems.

This paper presents a detailed study of real-world imbalance failures in four widely used DFSes, exploring their symptoms and triggering conditions. We found that test cases that incorporate both client requests and system configuration inputs are crucial for exposing these imbalances. However, generating such high-quality test cases is challenging due to the extensive combinations of these two input spaces. Guided by our study, we designed a testing framework named Themis. To efficiently prune the search space, Themis first models both the request and configuration inputs and transforms them into operation sequences. It then employs load variance-guided fuzzing to thoroughly explore the operation sequence and constantly generate test cases that make nodes loaded as differently as possible. Finally, Themis introduces a load detector to monitor the resource usage of each distributed node and precisely identify any imbalances. Themis has detected 10 new imbalance failures in four real-world DFSes, which have been addressed by the respective maintainers.
papers.abstract_zh:
分布式文件系统 (DFS) 是跨多个文件服务器或多个位置的文件系统。 DFS 中的负载平衡机制至关重要，因为它优化了所有节点的资源利用率并缩短了响应时间。然而，不正确的负载调度或负载均衡算法的实现错误可能会导致系统不平衡、挂起，甚至崩溃。这种不平衡故障可能很严重，并对分布式文件系统的可用性和安全性构成重大威胁。

本文对四种广泛使用的 DFS 中的现实世界不平衡故障进行了详细研究，探讨了它们的症状和触发条件。我们发现，包含客户端请求和系统配置输入的测试用例对于暴露这些不平衡至关重要。然而，由于这两个输入空间的广泛组合，生成如此高质量的测试用例具有挑战性。在我们的研究的指导下，我们设计了一个名为 Themis 的测试框架。为了有效地修剪搜索空间，Themis 首先对请求和配置输入进行建模，并将它们转换为操作序列。然后，它采用负载方差引导的模糊测试来彻底探索操作顺序，并不断生成测试用例，使节点负载尽可能不同。最后，Themis 引入了负载检测器来监控每个分布式节点的资源使用情况并精确识别任何不平衡情况。 Themis 在 4 个现实世界的 DFS 中检测到 10 个新的不平衡故障，这些故障已由各自的维护者解决。

papers.title: Towards Efficient Flash Caches with Emerging NVMe Flexible Data Placement SSDs.
papers.abstract:
NVMe Flash-based SSDs are widely deployed in data centers to cache working sets of large-scale web services. As data centers face increasing sustainability demands, such as reduced carbon emissions, efficient management of Flash overprovisioning and endurance has become crucial. Our analysis demonstrates that mixing data with different lifetimes on Flash blocks results in high device garbage collection costs, which either reduce device lifetime or necessitate host overprovisioning. Targeted data placement on Flash to minimize data intermixing and thus device write amplification shows promise for addressing this issue.

The NVMe Flexible Data Placement (FDP) proposal is a newly ratified technical proposal aimed at addressing data placement needs while reducing the software engineering costs associated with past storage interfaces, such as ZNS and Open-Channel SSDs. In this study, we explore the feasibility, benefits, and limitations of leveraging NVMe FDP primitives for data placement on Flash media in CacheLib, a popular open-source Flash cache widely deployed and used in Meta's software ecosystem as a caching building block. We demonstrate that targeted data placement in CacheLib using NVMe FDP SSDs helps reduce device write amplification, embodied carbon emissions, and power consumption with almost no overhead to other metrics. Using multiple production traces and their configurations from Meta and Twitter, we show that an ideal device write amplification of ~1 can be achieved with FDP, leading to improved SSD utilization and sustainable Flash cache deployments.
papers.abstract_zh:
基于 NVMe 闪存的 SSD 广泛部署在数据中心中，用于缓存大规模 Web 服务的工作集。随着数据中心面临日益增长的可持续性需求（例如减少碳排放），对闪存过度配置和耐用性的有效管理变得至关重要。我们的分析表明，在闪存块上混合具有不同生命周期的数据会导致较高的设备垃圾收集成本，这要么会缩短设备生命周期，要么需要主机过度配置。在闪存上进行有针对性的数据放置，以最大限度地减少数据混合，从而减少器件写入放大，有望解决这一问题。

NVMe灵活数据放置（FDP）提案是一项新批准的技术提案，旨在解决数据放置需求，同时降低与过去的存储接口（例如ZNS和开放通道SSD）相关的软件工程成本。在本研究中，我们探讨了利用 NVMe FDP 原语将数据放置在 CacheLib 中闪存介质上的可行性、优势和局限性，CacheLib 是一种流行的开源闪存缓存，在 Meta 的软件生态系统中广泛部署和用作缓存构建块。我们证明，使用 NVMe FDP SSD 在 CacheLib 中进行有针对性的数据放置有助于减少设备写入放大、隐含碳排放和功耗，而几乎没有其他指标的开销。使用来自 Meta 和 Twitter 的多个生产跟踪及其配置，我们表明使用 FDP 可以实现约 1 的理想设备写入放大，从而提高 SSD 利用率和可持续的闪存缓存部署。

papers.title: Towards VM Rescheduling Optimization Through Deep Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Modern industry-scale data centers need to manage a large number of virtual machines (VMs). Due to the continual creation and release of VMs, many small resource fragments are scattered across physical machines (PMs). To handle these fragments, data centers periodically reschedule some VMs to alternative PMs, a practice commonly referred to as VM rescheduling. Despite the increasing importance of VM rescheduling as data centers grow in size, the problem remains understudied. We first show that, unlike most combinatorial optimization tasks, the inference time of VM rescheduling algorithms significantly influences their performance, due to dynamic VM state changes during this period. This causes existing methods to scale poorly. Therefore, we develop a reinforcement learning system for VM rescheduling, VMR2L, which incorporates a set of customized techniques, such as a two-stage framework that accommodates diverse constraints and workload conditions, a feature extraction module that captures relational information specific to rescheduling, as well as a risk-seeking evaluation enabling users to optimize the trade-off between latency and accuracy. We conduct extensive experiments with data from an industry-scale data center. Our results show that VMR2L can achieve a performance comparable to the optimal solution but with a running time of seconds. Code12 and datasets3 are open-sourced.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代行业规模的数据中心需要管理大量虚拟机 (VM)。由于VM的不断创建和释放，许多小的资源碎片分散在物理机（PM）上。为了处理这些碎片，数据中心定期将一些虚拟机重新调度到替代的 PM，这种做法通常称为虚拟机重新调度。尽管随着数据中心规模的扩大，虚拟机重新调度变得越来越重要，但这个问题仍然没有得到充分研究。我们首先表明，与大多数组合优化任务不同，VM 重新调度算法的推理时间会显着影响其性能，因为在此期间 VM 状态会发生动态变化。这导致现有方法扩展性较差。因此，我们开发了一个用于VM重新调度的强化学习系统VMR2L，它结合了一组定制技术，例如适应不同约束和工作负载条件的两阶段框架、捕获特定于重新调度的关系信息的特征提取模块，以及使用户能够优化延迟和准确性之间的权衡的风险寻求评估。我们利用来自行业规模数据中心的数据进行了广泛的实验。我们的结果表明，VMR2L 可以实现与最优解决方案相当的性能，但运行时间为秒。 Code12 和 datasets3 是开源的。

papers.title: TUNA: Tuning Unstable and Noisy Cloud Applications.
papers.abstract: Autotuning plays a pivotal role in optimizing the performance of systems, particularly in large-scale cloud deployments. One of the main challenges in performing autotuning in the cloud arises from performance variability. We first investigate the extent to which noise slows autotuning and find that as little as 5% noise can lead to a 2.5x slowdown in converging to the best-performing configuration. We measure the magnitude of noise in cloud computing settings and find that while some components (CPU, disk) have almost no performance variability, there are still sources of significant variability (caches, memory). Furthermore, variability leads to autotuning finding unstable configurations. As many as 63.3% of the configurations selected as "best" during tuning can have their performance degrade by 30% or more when deployed. Using this as motivation, we propose a novel approach to improve the efficiency of autotuning systems by (a) detecting and removing outlier configurations and (b) using ML-based approaches to provide a more stable true signal of de-noised experiment results to the optimizer. The resulting system, TUNA (Tuning Unstable and Noisy Cloud Applications) enables faster convergence and robust configurations. Tuning PostgreSQL running mssales, an enterprise production workload, we find that TUNA can lead to 1.88x lower running time on average with 2.58x lower standard deviation compared to traditional sampling methodologies.
papers.abstract_zh: 自动调优在优化系统性能方面发挥着关键作用，特别是在大规模云部署中。在云中执行自动调整的主要挑战之一来自性能变化。我们首先研究了噪声在多大程度上减慢了自动调节速度，发现低至 5% 的噪声就可能导致收敛到最佳性能配置时速度减慢 2.5 倍。我们测量了云计算设置中的噪声大小，发现虽然某些组件（CPU、磁盘）几乎没有性能变化，但仍然存在显着变化的来源（缓存、内存）。此外，可变性会导致自动调整发现不稳定的配置。在调优过程中被选为“最佳”的配置中，多达 63.3% 的配置在部署时性能会下降 30% 或更多。以此为动机，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来提高自动调节系统的效率，方法是（a）检测和删除异常配置，以及（b）使用基于机器学习的方法向优化器提供更稳定的去噪实验结果的真实信号。由此产生的系统 TUNA（调整不稳定和嘈杂的云应用程序）可实现更快的收敛和稳健的配置。通过对运行 mssales（一种企业生产工作负载）的 PostgreSQL 进行调优，我们发现与传统采样方法相比，TUNA 可以将运行时间平均缩短 1.88 倍，标准差降低 2.58 倍。

papers.title: Understanding and Detecting SQL Function Bugs: Using Simple Boundary Arguments to Trigger Hundreds of DBMS Bugs.
papers.abstract:
Built-in SQL functions are crucial in Database Management Systems (DBMSs), supporting various operations and computations across multiple data types. They are essential for querying, data transformation, and aggregation. Despite their importance, the bugs in SQL functions have caused widespread problems in the real world, from system failures to arbitrary code execution. However, the understanding of the bug characteristics is limited. More importantly, conventional function testing methods struggle to generate semantically correct SQL test cases, while DBMS testing efforts are hard to measure built-in SQL functions.

This paper presents a comprehensive study of 318 built-in SQL function bugs, shedding light on their characteristics and root causes. Our investigation reveals that 87.4% of these bugs were caused by improper handling of boundary values of arguments. The boundary values of arguments come from three sources: literal values, type castings, and nested functions. By studying the bugs from three sources, we summarized 10 SQL patterns of bug-inducing queries. Moreover, we designed Soft, a testing tool based on the patterns to test seven widely used DBMSs, including PostgreSQL, MySQL, and ClickHouse. Soft discovered and confirmed 132 previously unknown SQL function bugs. The DBMS vendors took these bugs seriously and fixed 97 bugs in three days. For example, the CTO of ClickHouse commented on one bug: "We must fix it immediately or get rid of this function."
papers.abstract_zh:
内置 SQL 函数在数据库管理系统 (DBMS) 中至关重要，支持跨多种数据类型的各种操作和计算。它们对于查询、数据转换和聚合至关重要。尽管它们很重要，但 SQL 函数中的错误在现实世界中引起了广泛的问题，从系统故障到任意代码执行。然而，对 bug 特征的了解是有限的。更重要的是，传统的函数测试方法很难生成语义上正确的 SQL 测试用例，而 DBMS 测试工作很难衡量内置的 SQL 函数。

本文对 318 个内置 SQL 函数错误进行了全面研究，揭示了它们的特征和根本原因。我们的调查显示，87.4% 的错误是由于参数边界值处理不当造成的。参数的边界值来自三个来源：文字值、类型转换和嵌套函数。通过研究三个来源的错误，我们总结了 10 种引发错误的查询的 SQL 模式。此外，我们还设计了Soft，一个基于模式的测试工具来测试七种广泛使用的DBMS，包括PostgreSQL、MySQL和ClickHouse。 Soft发现并确认了132个以前未知的SQL函数错误。 DBMS 供应商认真对待这些错误，并在三天内修复了 97 个错误。例如，ClickHouse 的 CTO 对一个 bug 评论道：“我们必须立即修复它，或者去掉这个功能。”

papers.title: Understanding the Linux Kernel, Visually.
papers.abstract:
Understanding the Linux kernel is challenging due to its large and complex program state.
