While existing kernel debugging tools provide full access to kernel states at arbitrary levels of detail, developers often spend a significant amount of time sifting through redundant information to find what is truly useful. Additionally, the textual results provided by traditional debuggers are often insufficient for expressing high-dimensional information in a readable manner.

This paper presents Visualinux, the first debugging framework that can simplify the program state of the Linux kernel to a level that can be visually understood with low programming complexity and effort. Visualinux includes a domain-specific language for specifying simplifications of a kernel object graph, an SQL-like domain-specific language for customizing the simplified object graph, and a panel-based interactive debugger. Evaluation results show that Visualinux can visualize various complex kernel components and efficiently assist developers in diagnosing sophisticated kernel bugs.
papers.abstract_zh:
由于 Linux 内核的程序状态庞大且复杂，理解它是一项挑战。虽然现有的内核调试工具提供对任意详细级别的内核状态的完全访问，但开发人员经常花费大量时间筛选冗余信息以找到真正有用的信息。此外，传统调试器提供的文本结果通常不足以以可读的方式表达高维信息。

本文介绍了 Visualinux，这是第一个调试框架，它可以将 Linux 内核的程序状态简化到可以直观理解的水平，并且编程复杂性和工作量都很低。 Visualinux 包括用于指定内核对象图的简化的特定于域的语言、用于定制简化对象图的类似 SQL 的特定于域的语言以及基于面板的交互式调试器。评估结果表明，Visualinux可以可视化各种复杂的内核组件，并有效地帮助开发人员诊断复杂的内核错误。

papers.title: Accelerating Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning With GeniBatch.
papers.abstract:
Cross-silo privacy-preserving machine learning (PPML) adopt; Partial Homomorphic Encryption (PHE) for secure data combination and high-quality model training across multiple organizations (e.g., medical and financial). However, PHE introduces significant computation and communication overheads due to data inflation. Batch optimization is an encouraging direction to mitigate the problem by compressing multiple data into a single ciphertext. While promising, it is impractical for a large number of cross-silo PPML applications due to the limited vector operations support and severe data corruption.

In this paper, we present GeniBatch, a batch compiler that translates a PPML program with PHE into an efficient program with batch optimization. GeniBatch adopts a set of conversion rules to allow PHE programs involving all vector operations required in cross-silo PPML and ensures end-to-end result consistency before/after compiling. By proposing bit-reserving algorithms, GeniBatch avoids bit-overflow for the correctness of compiled programs and maximizes the compression ratio. We have integrated GeniBatch into FATE, a representative cross-silo PPML framework, and provided SIMD APIs to harness hardware acceleration. Experiments across six popular applications show that GeniBatch achieves up to 22.6× speedup and reduces network traffic by 5.4×-23.8× for generic cross-silo PPML applications.
papers.abstract_zh:
采用跨孤岛隐私保护机器学习（PPML）；部分同态加密 (PHE)，用于跨多个组织（例如医疗和金融）的安全数据组合和高质量模型训练。然而，由于数据膨胀，PHE 引入了大量的计算和通信开销。批量优化是通过将多个数据压缩为单个密文来缓解该问题的一个令人鼓舞的方向。虽然很有希望，但由于有限的向量操作支持和严重的数据损坏，对于大量跨孤岛 PPML 应用程序来说是不切实际的。

在本文中，我们介绍了 GeniBatch，这是一种批处理编译器，可将带有 PHE 的 PPML 程序转换为具有批处理优化的高效程序。 GeniBatch 采用一套转换规则，允许 PHE 程序涉及跨筒仓 PPML 所需的所有向量运算，并确保编译前后的端到端结果一致性。通过提出位保留算法，GeniBatch 避免了位溢出，以确保编译程序的正确性并最大化压缩比。我们已将 GeniBatch 集成到 FATE（一种代表性的跨孤岛 PPML 框架）中，并提供 SIMD API 来利用硬件加速。针对六种流行应用程序的实验表明，对于通用跨孤岛 PPML 应用程序，GeniBatch 实现了高达 22.6 倍的加速，并将网络流量减少了 5.4 倍-23.8 倍。

papers.title: Aceso: Efficient Parallel DNN Training through Iterative Bottleneck Alleviation.
papers.abstract:
Many parallel mechanisms, including data parallelism, tensor parallelism, and pipeline parallelism, have been proposed and combined together to support training increasingly large deep neural networks (DNN) on massive GPU devices. Given a DNN model and GPU cluster, finding the optimal configuration by combining these parallelism mechanisms is an NP-hard problem. Widely adopted mathematical programming approaches have been proposed to search in a configuration subspace, but they are still too costly when scaling to large models over numerous devices.

Aceso is a scalable parallel-mechanism auto-configuring system that operates iteratively. For a given parallel configuration, Aceso identifies a performance bottleneck and then, by summarizing all possible configuration adjustments with their resource consumption changes, infers their performance impacts to the bottleneck and selects one that mitigates the bottleneck. This process repeats for many iterations until a desired final configuration is found. Unlike mathematical programming approaches that examine the configurations subspace to find the optimal solution, Aceso searches in the configuration space in a stochastic approach by repeatedly identifying and alleviating bottlenecks. Aceso significantly reduces configuration searching cost by taking the approach of resolving one bottleneck at a time. This allows Aceso to find configurations that would be usually missed in subspace search approaches. We implemented and tested Aceso on representative DNN models. Evaluations show that it can scale to 1K-layer models. Compared to state-of-the-art systems, Aceso achieves up to 1.33× throughput improvement with less than 5% of the searching cost.
papers.abstract_zh:
许多并行机制，包括数据并行、张量并行和管道并行，已经被提出并组合在一起，以支持在大规模 GPU 设备上训练越来越大的深度神经网络 (DNN)。给定 DNN 模型和 GPU 集群，通过组合这些并行机制找到最佳配置是一个 NP 困难问题。已经提出了广泛采用的数学编程方法来在配置子空间中进行搜索，但在扩展到众多设备上的大型模型时，它们的成本仍然太高。

Aceso 是一个可迭代运行的可扩展并行机制自动配置系统。对于给定的并行配置，Aceso 会识别性能瓶颈，然后通过总结所有可能的配置调整及其资源消耗变化，推断其对瓶颈的性能影响，并选择缓解瓶颈的方案。该过程重复多次迭代，直到找到所需的最终配置。与检查配置子空间以找到最佳解决方案的数学规划方法不同，Aceso 通过重复识别和缓解瓶颈以随机方法在配置空间中进行搜索。 Aceso采用一次解决一个瓶颈的方法，显着降低了配置搜索成本。这使得 Aceso 能够找到子空间搜索方法中通常会错过的配置。我们在代表性 DNN 模型上实现并测试了 Aceso。评估表明它可以扩展到 1K 层模型。与最先进的系统相比，Aceso 以不到 5% 的搜索成本实现了高达 1.33 倍的吞吐量提升。

papers.title: Adaptable Runtime Monitoring for Intermittent Systems.
papers.abstract:
Batteryless energy harvesting devices compute intermittently due to power failures that frequently interrupt the computational activity and lead to charging delays. To ensure functional correctness in intermittent computing, applications must exhibit several unique properties, such as guarantees for computational progress despite power failures and prevention of stale operations caused by charging delays. We observe that current software support for intermittent computing allows for checking only a fixed set of properties and leads to tightly coupled application and property-checking, thus hampering modularity, scalability, and maintainability.

In this paper, we present ARTEMIS, the first framework designed to facilitate flexible property checking of intermittent programs at runtime. ARTEMIS is developed based on techniques from the area of runtime monitoring, offers a specification language for specifying an open set of properties, and provides automatic generation of monitors responsible for checking the properties. Our evaluation showed that ARTEMIS achieves comparable efficiency to state-of-the-art solutions while significantly preventing failure scenarios through its monitoring capabilities.
papers.abstract_zh:
无电池能量收集设备由于电源故障而间歇性计算，经常中断计算活动并导致充电延迟。为了确保间歇计算中的功能正确性，应用程序必须表现出几个独特的属性，例如在电源故障的情况下保证计算进度以及防止充电延迟导致的陈旧操作。我们观察到，当前对间歇性计算的软件支持仅允许检查一组固定的属性，并导致应用程序和属性检查紧密耦合，从而阻碍了模块化、可扩展性和可维护性。

在本文中，我们提出了 ARTEMIS，这是第一个旨在促进运行时间歇性程序的灵活属性检查的框架。 ARTEMIS 是基于运行时监控领域的技术开发的，提供了用于指定一组开放属性的规范语言，并提供了负责检查属性的监视器的自动生成。我们的评估表明，ARTEMIS 的效率可与最先进的解决方案相媲美，同时通过其监控功能显着预防故障情况。

papers.title: Astraea: Towards Fair and Efficient Learning-based Congestion Control.
papers.abstract:
Recent years have witnessed a plethora of learning-based solutions for congestion control (CC) that demonstrate better performance over traditional TCP schemes. However, they fail to provide consistently good convergence properties, including fairness, fast convergence and stability, due to the mismatch between their objective functions and these properties. Despite being intuitive, integrating these properties into existing learning-based CC is challenging, because: 1) their training environments are designed for the performance optimization of single flow but incapable of cooperative multi-flow optimization, and 2) there is no directly measurable metric to represent these properties into the training objective function.

We present Astraea, a new learning-based congestion control that ensures fast convergence to fairness with stability. At the heart of Astraea is a multi-agent deep reinforcement learning framework that explicitly optimizes these convergence properties during the training process by enabling the learning of interactive policy between multiple competing flows, while maintaining high performance. We further build a faithful multi-flow environment that emulates the competing behaviors of concurrent flows, explicitly expressing convergence properties to enable their optimization during training. We have fully implemented Astraea and our comprehensive experiments show that Astraea can quickly converge to fairness point and exhibit better stability than its counterparts. For example, Astraea achieves near-optimal bandwidth sharing (i.e., fairness) when multiple flows compete for the same bottleneck, delivers up to 8.4× faster convergence speed and 2.8× smaller throughput deviation, while achieving comparable or even better performance over prior solutions.
papers.abstract_zh:
近年来出现了大量基于学习的拥塞控制 (CC) 解决方案，这些解决方案比传统 TCP 方案表现出更好的性能。然而，由于目标函数与这些特性之间的不匹配，它们无法提供一致的良好收敛特性，包括公平性、快速收敛和稳定性。尽管很直观，但将这些属性集成到现有的基于学习的 CC 中是具有挑战性的，因为：1）它们的训练环境是为单流的性能优化而设计的，但无法进行协作多流优化；2）没有直接可测量的度量来将这些属性表示到训练目标函数中。

我们推出了 Astraea，一种新的基于学习的拥塞控制，可确保快速收敛到公平且稳定。 Astraea 的核心是一个多智能体深度强化学习框架，通过支持学习多个竞争流之间的交互策略，在训练过程中明确优化这些收敛特性，同时保持高性能。我们进一步构建了一个忠实的多流环境，模拟并发流的竞争行为，明确表达收敛属性以在训练期间实现优化。我们已经全面实现了 Astraea，我们的综合实验表明 Astraea 可以快速收敛到公平点，并且比同类产品表现出更好的稳定性。例如，当多个流竞争同一瓶颈时，Astraea 实现了近乎最优的带宽共享（即公平性），收敛速度提高了 8.4 倍，吞吐量偏差缩小了 2.8 倍，同时实现了与先前解决方案相当甚至更好的性能。

papers.title: Atlas: Hybrid Cloud Migration Advisor for Interactive Microservices.
papers.abstract: Hybrid cloud provides an attractive solution to microservices for better resource elasticity. A subset of application components can be offloaded from the on-premises cluster to the cloud, where they can readily access additional resources. However, the selection of this subset is challenging because of the large number of possible combinations. A poor choice degrades the application performance, disrupts the critical services, and increases the cost to the extent of making the use of hybrid cloud unviable. This paper presents Atlas, a hybrid cloud migration advisor. Atlas uses a data-driven approach to learn how each user-facing API utilizes different components and their network footprints to drive the migration decision. It learns to accelerate the discovery of high-quality migration plans from millions and offers recommendations with customizable trade-offs among three quality indicators: end-to-end latency of user-facing APIs representing application performance, service availability, and cloud hosting costs. Atlas continuously monitors the application even after the migration for proactive recommendations. Our evaluation shows that Atlas can achieve 21% better API performance (latency) and 11% cheaper cost with less service disruption than widely used solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 混合云为微服务提供了一个有吸引力的解决方案，以实现更好的资源弹性。可以将应用程序组件的子集从本地集群卸载到云，以便它们可以轻松访问其他资源。然而，由于可能的组合数量众多，因此该子集的选择具有挑战性。糟糕的选择会降低应用程序性能，破坏关键服务，并增加成本，甚至使混合云的使用变得不可行。本文介绍了 Atlas，一种混合​​云迁移顾问。 Atlas 使用数据驱动的方法来了解每个面向用户的 API 如何利用不同的组件及其网络足迹来推动迁移决策。它学习如何加速发现数百万人的高质量迁移计划，并提供在三个质量指标之间进行可定制权衡的建议：代表应用程序性能、服务可用性和云托管成本的面向用户的 API 的端到端延迟。即使在迁移后，Atlas 也会持续监控应用程序以获取主动建议。我们的评估表明，与广泛使用的解决方案相比，Atlas 的 API 性能（延迟）提高了 21%，成本降低了 11%，服务中断也更少。

papers.title: Automatic Root Cause Analysis via Large Language Models for Cloud Incidents.
papers.abstract: Ensuring the reliability and availability of cloud services necessitates efficient root cause analysis (RCA) for cloud incidents. Traditional RCA methods, which rely on manual investigations of data sources such as logs and traces, are often laborious, error-prone, and challenging for on-call engineers. In this paper, we introduce RCACopilot, an innovative on-call system empowered by the large language model for automating RCA of cloud incidents. RCACopilot matches incoming incidents to corresponding incident handlers based on their alert types, aggregates the critical runtime diagnostic information, predicts the incident's root cause category, and provides an explanatory narrative. We evaluate RCACopilot using a real-world dataset consisting of a year's worth of incidents from Microsoft. Our evaluation demonstrates that RCACopilot achieves RCA accuracy up to 0.766. Furthermore, the diagnostic information collection component of RCACopilot has been successfully in use at Microsoft for over four years.
papers.abstract_zh: 确保云服务的可靠性和可用性需要对云事件进行有效的根本原因分析 (RCA)。传统的 RCA 方法依赖于对日志和跟踪等数据源进行手动调查，对于待命工程师来说通常很费力、容易出错且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了 RCACopilot，这是一种创新的待命系统，由大型语言模型支持，用于自动化云事件 RCA。 RCACopilot 根据警报类型将传入事件与相应的事件处理程序进行匹配，聚合关键运行时诊断信息，预测事件的根本原因类别，并提供解释性叙述。我们使用由 Microsoft 一年的事件组成的真实数据集来评估 RCACopilot。我们的评估表明 RCACopilot 的 RCA 准确度高达 0.766。此外，RCACopilot 的诊断信息收集组件已在 Microsoft 成功使用了四年多。

papers.title: Bandle: Asynchronous State Machine Replication Made Efficient.
papers.abstract:
State machine replication (SMR) uses consensus as its core component for reaching agreement among a group of processes, in order to provide fault-tolerant services. Most SMR protocols, such as Paxos and Raft, are designed in the partial synchrony model. Partially synchronous protocols rely on timing assumptions to elect a special role (such as the leader), which may become the performance bottleneck under a heavy workload. From an engineering perspective, partially synchronous protocols have to wait for a pre-defined period of time and implement a (complicated) failover mechanism in order to replace the faulty leader. In contrast, asynchronous protocols are immune to such problems.

This paper presents Bandle, a simple and highly efficient asynchronous SMR protocol. Instead of electing a special role, Bandle evenly assigns sequence numbers to each process and proceeds in a leaderless manner. We further propose a binary agreement protocol, referred to as FlashBA, which decides whether a given proposal can be committed. FlashBA is inspired by Ben-Or's randomized algorithm but leverages a promise mechanism to achieve optimal latency (i.e., one message delay in the best case). An empirical study on the Amazon EC2 platform shows that Bandle delivers exceptional performance when deployed within a data center and across the globe.
papers.abstract_zh:
状态机复制（SMR）使用共识作为其核心组件，用于在一组进程之间达成一致，以提供容错服务。大多数SMR协议，例如Paxos和Raft，都是在部分同步模型中设计的。部分同步协议依赖于时序假设来选举特殊角色（例如领导者），这可能会成为繁重工作负载下的性能瓶颈。从工程角度来看，部分同步协议必须等待预定义的时间段并实现（复杂的）故障转移机制才能替换出现故障的领导者。相比之下，异步协议则不受此类问题的影响。

本文提出了 Bandle，一种简单且高效的异步 SMR 协议。 Bandle 没有选举特殊角色，而是为每个进程均匀分配序列号，并以无领导的方式进行。我们进一步提出了一个二进制协议，称为FlashBA，它决定是否可以提交给定的提案。 FlashBA 受到 Ben-Or 随机算法的启发，但利用承诺机制来实现最佳延迟（即在最佳情况下一个消息延迟）。对 Amazon EC2 平台的实证研究表明，Bandle 在数据中心内和全球范围内部署时可提供卓越的性能。

papers.title: Blaze: Holistic Caching for Iterative Data Processing.
papers.abstract:
Modern data processing workloads, such as machine learning and graph processing, involve iterative computations to converge generated models into higher accuracy. An effective caching mechanism is vital to expedite iterative computations since the intermediate data that needs to be stored in memory grows larger over iterations, often exceeding the memory capacity. However, existing systems handle intermediate data through separate operational layers (e.g., caching, eviction, and recovery), with each layer working independently in a greedy or cost-agnostic manner. These layers typically rely on user annotations and past access patterns, failing to make globally optimal decisions for the workload.

To overcome these limitations, Blaze introduces a unified caching mechanism that integrates the separate operational layers. Blaze dynamically captures the workload structure and metrics using profiling and inductive regression, and automatically estimates the potential data caching efficiency associated with different operational decisions based on the profiled information. To achieve this goal, Blaze incorporates potential data recovery costs across stages into a single cost optimization function, which informs the optimal partition state and location. This approach reduces the significant disk I/O overheads caused by oversized partitions and the recomputation overheads for partitions with long lineages, while efficiently utilizing the constrained memory space. Our evaluations demonstrate that Blaze can accelerate end-to-end application completion time by 2.02 - 2.52× compared to recomputation-based MEM_ONLY Spark, and by 1.08 - 2.86× compared to checkpoint-based MEM+DISK Spark, while reducing the cache data stored on disk by 95% on average.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代数据处理工作负载（例如机器学习和图形处理）涉及迭代计算，以将生成的模型收敛到更高的精度。有效的缓存机制对于加快迭代计算至关重要，因为需要存储在内存中的中间数据在迭代过程中会变得越来越大，通常会超出内存容量。然而，现有系统通过单独的操作层（例如缓存、驱逐和恢复）处理中间数据，每个层以贪婪或成本不可知的方式独立工作。这些层通常依赖于用户注释和过去的访问模式，无法针对工作负载做出全局最佳决策。

为了克服这些限制，Blaze 引入了集成单独操作层的统一缓存机制。 Blaze 使用分析和归纳回归动态捕获工作负载结构和指标，并根据分析信息自动估计与不同操作决策相关的潜在数据缓存效率。为了实现这一目标，Blaze 将跨阶段的潜在数据恢复成本合并到单个成本优化函数中，该函数可告知最佳分区状态和位置。这种方法减少了由过大的分区引起的显着磁盘 I/O 开销以及具有长沿袭的分区的重新计算开销，同时有效地利用有限的内存空间。我们的评估表明，与基于重新计算的 MEM_ONLY Spark 相比，Blaze 可以将端到端应用程序完成时间加快 2.02 - 2.52 倍，与基于检查点的 MEM+DISK Spark 相比，可以加快 1.08 - 2.86 倍，同时将存储在磁盘上的缓存数据平均减少 95%。

papers.title: Blox: A Modular Toolkit for Deep Learning Schedulers.
papers.abstract: Deep Learning (DL) workloads have rapidly increased in popularity in enterprise clusters and several new cluster schedulers have been proposed in recent years to support these workloads. With rapidly evolving DL workloads, it is challenging to quickly prototype and compare scheduling policies across workloads. Further, as prior systems target different aspects of scheduling (resource allocation, placement, elasticity etc.), it is also challenging to combine these techniques and understand the overall benefits. To address these challenges we propose Blox, a modular toolkit which allows developers to compose individual components and realize diverse scheduling frameworks. We identify a set of core abstractions for DL scheduling, implement several existing schedulers using these abstractions, and verify the fidelity of these implementations by reproducing results from prior research. We also highlight how we can evaluate and compare existing schedulers in new settings: different workload traces, higher cluster load, change in DNN workloads and deployment characteristics. Finally, we showcase Blox's extensibility by composing policies from different schedulers, and implementing novel policies with minimal code changes. Blox is available at https://github.com/msr-fiddle/blox.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 工作负载在企业集群中迅速普及，近年来提出了几种新的集群调度程序来支持这些工作负载。随着深度学习工作负载的快速发展，快速构建原型并比较跨工作负载的调度策略具有挑战性。此外，由于现有系统针对调度的不同方面（资源分配、放置、弹性等），因此将这些技术结合起来并了解总体优势也具有挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Blox，这是一个模块化工具包，允许开发人员组合单独的组件并实现不同的调度框架。我们确定了深度学习调度的一组核心抽象，使用这些抽象实现了几个现有的调度器，并通过重现先前研究的结果来验证这些实现的保真度。我们还重点介绍了如何在新设置中评估和比较现有调度程序：不同的工作负载跟踪、更高的集群负载、DNN 工作负载和部署特征的变化。最后，我们通过组合来自不同调度程序的策略并以最少的代码更改实现新颖的策略来展示 Blox 的可扩展性。 Blox 可从 https://github.com/msr-fiddle/blox 获取。

papers.title: CCL-BTree: A Crash-Consistent Locality-Aware B+-Tree for Reducing XPBuffer-Induced Write Amplification in Persistent Memory.
papers.abstract:
In persistent B+ -Tree, random updates of small key-value (KV) pairs will cause severe XPBuffer-induced write amplification (XBI-amplification) because CPU cacheline size is smaller than media access granularity in persistent memory (PM). We observe that XBI-amplification directly determines the application performance when the PM bandwidth is exhausted in multi-thread scenarios. However, none of the existing work can efficiently address the XBI-amplification issue while maintaining superior range query performance.

In this paper, we design a novel crash-consistent locality-aware B+-Tree (CCL-BTree). It preserves the key order between adjacent leaf nodes for efficient range query and proposes a leaf-node centric buffering strategy that merges writes and then flushes them together to reduce the number of flushes to the PM media. For crash-consistency, all the buffered KVs are recorded in write-ahead logs. CCL-BTree further devises write-conservative logging to skip unnecessary log operations, and locality-aware garbage collection to avoid random PM writes in reclaiming log data. Our experiments show that CCL-BTree reduces the XBI-amplification by up to 81%, improves the insert throughput by up to 9.35×, and achieves good range query performance compared to state-of-the-art persistent B+-Trees.
papers.abstract_zh:
在持久 B+ -Tree 中，小键值 (KV) 对的随机更新将导致严重的 XPBuffer 引起的写放大 (XBI-amplification)，因为 CPU 缓存行大小小于持久内存 (PM) 中的介质访问粒度。我们观察到，XBI 放大直接决定了多线程场景下 PM 带宽耗尽时的应用程序性能。然而，现有的工作都无法在保持卓越的范围查询性能的同时有效解决 XBI 放大问题。

在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的崩溃一致局部感知 B+ 树（CCL-BTree）。它保留了相邻叶节点之间的键顺序以进行有效的范围查询，并提出了一种以叶节点为中心的缓冲策略，该策略将写入合并然后将它们刷新到一起以减少刷新到 PM 介质的次数。为了保证崩溃一致性，所有缓冲的 KV 都记录在预写日志中。 CCL-BTree 进一步设计了写保守日志记录以跳过不必要的日志操作，并设计了局部感知垃圾收集以避免在回收日志数据时随机 PM 写入。我们的实验表明，与最先进的持久 B+-Tree 相比，CCL-BTree 可将 XBI 放大降低高达 81%，将插入吞吐量提高高达 9.35 倍，并实现良好的范围查询性能。

papers.title: CDMPP: A Device-Model Agnostic Framework for Latency Prediction of Tensor Programs.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have shown excellent performance in a wide range of machine learning applications. Knowing the latency of running a DNN model or tensor program on a specific device is useful in various tasks, such as DNN graph- or tensor-level optimization and device selection. Considering the large space of DNN models and devices that impedes direct profiling of all combinations, recent efforts focus on building a predictor to model the performance of DNN models on different devices. However, none of the existing attempts have achieved a cost model that can accurately predict the performance of various tensor programs while supporting both training and inference accelerators. We propose CDMPP, an efficient tensor program latency prediction framework for both cross-model and cross-device prediction. We design an informative but efficient representation of tensor programs, called compact ASTs, and a pre-order-based positional encoding method, to capture the internal structure of tensor programs. We develop a domain-adaption-inspired method to learn domain-invariant representations and devise a KMeans-based sampling algorithm, for the predictor to learn from different domains (i.e., different DNN operators and devices). Our extensive experiments on a diverse range of DNN models and devices demonstrate that CDMPP significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with 14.03% and 10.85% prediction error for cross-model and cross-device prediction, respectively, and one order of magnitude higher training efficiency. The implementation and the expanded dataset are available at https://github.com/joapolarbear/cdmpp.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在广泛的机器学习应用中表现出了出色的性能。了解在特定设备上运行 DNN 模型或张量程序的延迟对于各种任务非常有用，例如 DNN 图级或张量级优化和设备选择。考虑到 DNN 模型和设备的庞大空间阻碍了对所有组合的直接分析，最近的工作重点是构建一个预测器来对 DNN 模型在不同设备上的性能进行建模。然而，现有的尝试都没有实现能够准确预测各种张量程序的性能，同时支持训练和推理加速器的成本模型。我们提出了 CDMPP，一种用于跨模型和跨设备预测的高效张量程序延迟预测框架。我们设计了一种信息丰富但高效的张量程序表示（称为紧凑 AST），以及基于预序的位置编码方法，以捕获张量程序的内部结构。我们开发了一种受域适应启发的方法来学习域不变表示，并设计了一种基于 KMeans 的采样算法，以便预测器从不同的域（即不同的 DNN 运算符和设备）中学习。我们对各种 DNN 模型和设备进行的广泛实验表明，CDMPP 显着优于最先进的基线，跨模型和跨设备预测的预测误差分别为 14.03% 和 10.85%，训练效率提高了一个数量级。实现和扩展数据集可在 https://github.com/joapolarbear/cdmpp 获取。

papers.title: Characterization and Reclamation of Frozen Garbage in Managed FaaS Workloads.
papers.abstract: FaaS (function-as-a-service) is becoming a popular workload in cloud environments due to its virtues such as auto-scaling and pay-as-you-go. High-level languages like JavaScript and Java are commonly used in FaaS for programmability, but their managed runtimes complicate memory management in the cloud. This paper first observes the issue of frozen garbage, which is caused by freezing cached function instances where their threads have been paused but the unused memory (e.g., garbage) is not reclaimed due to the semantic gap between FaaS and the managed runtime. This paper presents the first characterization of the negative effects induced by frozen garbage with various functions, which uncovers that it can occupy more than half of FaaS instances' memory resources on average. To this end, this paper proposes Desiccant, a freeze-aware memory manager for managed workloads in FaaS, which reclaims idle memory resources consumed by frozen garbage from managed runtime instances and thus notably improves memory efficiency. The evaluation on various FaaS workloads shows that Desiccant can reduce FaaS functions' peak memory consumption by up to 6.72×. Such saved memory consumption allows caching more FaaS instances to reduce the frequency of cold boots (creating instances before function execution) and p99 latency by up to 4.49× and 37.5%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: FaaS（功能即服务）由于其自动扩展和按需付费等优点，正在成为云环境中流行的工作负载。 JavaScript 和 Java 等高级语言通常在 FaaS 中用于实现可编程性，但它们的托管运行时使云中的内存管理变得复杂。本文首先观察了冻结垃圾的问题，这是由于冻结了缓存的函数实例而导致的，其中它们的线程已暂停，但由于 FaaS 和托管运行时之间的语义差距，未使用的内存（例如垃圾）没有被回收。本文首次描述了具有各种功能的冻结垃圾带来的负面影响，发现它平均可以占用 FaaS 实例一半以上的内存资源。为此，本文提出了 Desiccant，一种用于 FaaS 中托管工作负载的冻结感知内存管理器，它从托管运行时实例中回收冻结垃圾消耗的空闲内存资源，从而显着提高内存效率。对各种 FaaS 工作负载的评估表明，Desiccant 可以将 FaaS 功能的峰值内存消耗降低高达 6.72 倍。这样节省的内存消耗允许缓存更多 FaaS 实例，从而将冷启动频率（在函数执行之前创建实例）和 p99 延迟分别降低高达 4.49 倍和 37.5%。

papers.title: Concealing Compression-accelerated I/O for HPC Applications through In Situ Task Scheduling.
papers.abstract: Lossy compression and asynchronous I/O are two of the most effective solutions for reducing storage overhead and enhancing I/O performance in large-scale high-performance computing (HPC) applications. However, current approaches have limitations that prevent them from fully leveraging lossy compression, and they may also result in task collisions, which restrict the overall performance of HPC applications. To address these issues, we propose an optimization approach for the task scheduling problem that encompasses computation, compression, and I/O. Our algorithm adaptively selects the optimal compression and I/O queue to minimize the performance degradation of the computation. We also introduce an intra-node I/O workload balancing mechanism that evenly distributes the workload across different processes. Additionally, we design a framework that incorporates fine-grained compression, a compressed data buffer, and a shared Huffman tree to fully benefit from our proposed task scheduling. Experimental results with up to 16 nodes and 64 GPUs from ORNL Summit, as well as real-world HPC applications, demonstrate that our solution reduces I/O overhead by up to 3.8× and 2.6× compared to non-compression and asynchronous I/O solutions, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 有损压缩和异步 I/O 是在大规模高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序中减少存储开销和增强 I/O 性能的两种最有效的解决方案。然而，当前的方法存在局限性，无法充分利用有损压缩，并且还可能导致任务冲突，从而限制 HPC 应用程序的整体性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种针对任务调度问题的优化方法，其中包括计算、压缩和 I/O。我们的算法自适应地选择最佳压缩和 I/O 队列，以最大限度地减少计算性能下降。我们还引入了节点内 I/O 工作负载平衡机制，可以在不同进程之间均匀分配工作负载。此外，我们设计了一个框架，其中包含细粒度压缩、压缩数据缓冲区和共享霍夫曼树，以充分受益于我们提出的任务调度。 ORNL Summit 的多达 16 个节点和 64 个 GPU 的实验结果以及实际的 HPC 应用程序表明，与非压缩和异步 I/O 解决方案相比，我们的解决方案分别将 I/O 开销减少了 3.8 倍和 2.6 倍。

papers.title: Contigra: Graph Mining with Containment Constraints.
papers.abstract:
While graph mining systems employ efficient task-parallel strategies to quickly explore subgraphs of interest (or matches), they remain oblivious to containment constraints like maximality and minimality, resulting in expensive constraint checking on every explored match as well as redundant explorations that limit their scalability.

In this paper, we develop Contigra for efficient graph mining with containment constraints. We first model the impact of constraints in terms of dependencies across exploration tasks, and then exploit the dependencies to develop: (a) task fusion that merges correlated tasks to increase cache reuse; (b) task promotion that allows explorations to continue from available subgraphs and skip re-exploring subgraphs from scratch; (c) task cancelations that avoid unnecessary constraint checking and prioritizes faster constraint validations; and (d) task skipping that safely skips certain exploration and validation tasks. Experimental results show that Contigra scale to graph mining workloads with containment constraints, which could not be handled by existing state-of-the-art systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
虽然图挖掘系统采用高效的任务并行策略来快速探索感兴趣的子图（或匹配），但它们仍然忽视最大值和最小值等包含约束，从而导致对每个探索的匹配进行昂贵的约束检查以及限制其可扩展性的冗余探索。

在本文中，我们开发了 Contigra，用于具有包含约束的高效图挖掘。我们首先根据探索任务的依赖关系对约束的影响进行建模，然后利用依赖关系来开发：（a）任务融合，合并相关任务以增加缓存重用； (b) 任务升级，允许从可用子图继续探索并跳过从头开始重新探索子图； (c) 任务取消，以避免不必要的约束检查并优先考虑更快的约束验证； (d) 任务跳过，安全地跳过某些探索和验证任务。实验结果表明，Contigra 可扩展到具有遏制约束的图挖掘工作负载，而现有最先进的系统无法处理这些工作负载。

papers.title: Core Graph: Exploiting Edge Centrality to Speedup the Evaluation of Iterative Graph Queries.
papers.abstract:
When evaluating an iterative graph query over a large graph, systems incur significant overheads due to repeated graph transfer across the memory hierarchy coupled with repeated (redundant) propagation of values over the edges in the graph. An approach for reducing these overheads combines the use of a small proxy graph and the large original graph in a two phase query evaluation. The first phase evaluates the query on the proxy graph incurring low overheads and producing mostly precise results. The second phase uses these mostly precise results to bootstrap query evaluation on the larger original graph producing fully precise results. The effectiveness of this approach depends upon the quality of the proxy graph. Prior methods find proxy graphs that are either large or produce highly imprecise results.

We present a new form of proxy graph named the Core Graph (CG) that is not only small, it also produces highly precise results. A CG is a subgraph of the larger input graph that contains all vertices but on average contains only 10.7% of edges and yet produces precise results for 94.5-99.9% vertices in the graph for different queries. The finding of such an effective CG is based on our key new insight, namely, a small subset of non-zero centrality edges are responsible for determining the converged results of nearly all the vertices across different queries. We develop techniques to identify a CG that produces precise results for most vertices and optimizations to efficiently compute precise results of remaining vertices. Across six kinds of graph queries and four input graphs, CGs improved the performance of GPU-based Subway system by up to 4.48×, of out-of-core disk-based GridGraph system by up to 13.62×, and of Ligra in-memory graph processing system by up to 9.31×.
papers.abstract_zh:
当评估大型图上的迭代图查询时，由于跨内存层次结构的重复图传输以及图边缘上值的重复（冗余）传播，系统会产生大量开销。减少这些开销的方法在两阶段查询评估中结合使用小型代理图和大型原始图。第一阶段评估代理图上的查询，产生较低的开销并产生大部分精确的结果。第二阶段使用这些最精确的结果来引导对较大原始图的查询评估，产生完全精确的结果。这种方法的有效性取决于代理图的质量。先前的方法发现代理图要么很大，要么产生非常不精确的结果。

我们提出了一种新形式的代理图，称为核心图（CG），它不仅很小，而且还能产生高精度的结果。 CG 是较大输入图的子图，其中包含所有顶点，但平均仅包含 10.7% 的边，但针对不同查询，可以为图中 94.5-99.9% 的顶点生成精确结果。这种有效的 CG 的发现基于我们的关键新见解，即非零中心性边的一小部分子集负责确定不同查询中几乎所有顶点的收敛结果。我们开发技术来识别为大多数顶点产生精确结果的 CG，并进行优化以有效计算剩余顶点的精确结果。在六种图查询和四种输入图上，CG 将基于 GPU 的 Subway 系统的性能提高了 4.48 倍，将基于核外磁盘的 GridGraph 系统的性能提高了 13.62 倍，将 Ligra 内存中图处理系统的性能提高了 9.31 倍。

papers.title: CSAL: the Next-Gen Local Disks for the Cloud.
papers.abstract:
Cloud local disks are attractive for their affordable price and high performance. The recent advancement in CPUs motivates cloud vendors to further multiplex the computing resources to serve more users. Unfortunately, such proposals are constrained by the limited offerings of cloud local disks per server as the underlying storage devices are either large but slow (e.g., HDDs) or fast yet small (e.g., NVMe SSDs).

In this paper, we explore the possibility of leveraging high-capacity QLC-based SSDs for cloud local disks. However, the three preliminary unsuccessful attempts indicate that QLC SSDs cannot simply work as drop-in replacement. The root cause is the two levels of write amplification caused by device-level address mapping with Indirection Unit and NAND-level garbage collection.

With these lessons learned, we propose CSAL, the next-gen local disks in Alibaba Cloud. CSAL includes a high-performance SSD as write buffers and a large-capacity QLC SSD for persistence. With a two-level Logical to Physical (L2P) address mapping table, CSAL achieves fine-grained (4KB) data accessing and significantly alleviates the two levels of write amplification. Results show that CSAL always prevails with superior performance and can achieve up to 2.22×, 1.82×, and 2.03× speedups against the second-best peers in micro, application, and deployment benchmarking, respectively. As of now, we have deployed CSAL on thousands of servers and made CSAL open-source to the public.
papers.abstract_zh:
云本地盘以其实惠的价格和高性能而具有吸引力。 CPU 的最新进步促使云供应商进一步复用计算资源以服务更多用户。不幸的是，此类提议受到每台服务器提供的云本地磁盘有限的限制，因为底层存储设备要么大但慢（例如 HDD），要么快但小（例如 NVMe SSD）。

在本文中，我们探讨了利用基于QLC的大容量SSD作为云本地盘的可能性。然而，三个初步的不成功尝试表明QLC SSD不能简单地作为替代品。根本原因是设备级地址映射与间接单元和NAND级垃圾收集造成的两级写放大。

有了这些经验教训，我们提出了阿里云的下一代本地盘CSAL。 CSAL 包括作为写入缓冲区的高性能 SSD 和用于持久性的大容量 QLC SSD。 CSAL通过两级逻辑到物理（L2P）地址映射表，实现细粒度（4KB）数据访问，并显着减轻两级写放大。结果表明，CSAL 始终以卓越的性能占据上风，在微、应用程序和部署基准测试中与第二好的同行相比，分别实现了高达 2.22 倍、1.82 倍和 2.03 倍的加速。截至目前，我们已经在数千台服务器上部署了CSAL，并向公众开源了CSAL。

papers.title: Dashing and Star: Byzantine Fault Tolerance with Weak Certificates.
papers.abstract:
State-of-the-art Byzantine fault-tolerant (BFT) protocols assuming partial synchrony such as SBFT and HotStuff use regular certificates obtained from 2f + 1 (partial) signatures. We show that one can use weak certificates obtained from only f + 1 signatures to assist in designing more robust and more efficient BFT protocols. We design and implement two BFT systems: Dashing (a family of two HotStuff-style BFT protocols) and Star (a parallel BFT framework).

We first present Dashingl that targets both efficiency and robustness using weak certificates. Dashingl is also network-adaptive in the sense that it can leverage network connection discrepancy to improve performance. We show that Dashing1 outperforms HotStuff in various failure-free and failure scenarios. We then present Dashing2 enabling a one-phase fast path by using strong certificates from 3f + 1 signatures.

We then leverage weak certificates to build Star, a highly scalable BFT framework that delivers transactions from n - f replicas. Star compares favorably with existing protocols in terms of liveness, communication, state transfer, scalability, and/or robustness under failures.

We demonstrate that Dashing achieves 47%-107% higher peak throughput than HotStuff for experiments on Amazon EC2. Meanwhile, unlike all known BFT protocols whose performance degrades as f grows large, the peak throughput of Star increases as f grows. When deployed in a WAN with 91 replicas across five continents, Star achieves an impressive throughput of 256 ktx/sec, 2.38x that of Narwhal.
papers.abstract_zh:
最先进的拜占庭容错 (BFT) 协议假设部分同步，例如 SBFT 和 HotStuff，使用从 2f + 1（部分）签名获得的常规证书。我们证明，可以使用仅从 f + 1 个签名获得的弱证书来帮助设计更稳健、更高效的 BFT 协议。我们设计并实现了两个 BFT 系统：Dashing（两个 HotStuff 风格的 BFT 协议系列）和 Star（一个并行 BFT 框架）。

我们首先提出 Dashingl，它使用弱证书来实现效率和稳健性。 Dashingl 也是网络自适应的，因为它可以利用网络连接差异来提高性能。我们证明 Dashing1 在各种无故障和故障场景中都优于 HotStuff。然后，我们提出 Dashing2 通过使用来自 3f + 1 签名的强证书来实现单阶段快速路径。

然后，我们利用弱证书构建 Star，这是一个高度可扩展的 BFT 框架，可以从 n - f 个副本交付交易。 Star 在活跃性、通信、状态传输、可扩展性和/或故障下的鲁棒性方面优于现有协议。

我们证明，在 Amazon EC2 上进行实验时，Dashing 的峰值吞吐量比 HotStuff 高 47%-107%。同时，与所有已知的 BFT 协议的性能随着 f 变大而下降不同，Star 的峰值吞吐量随着 f 的变大而增加。当部署在横跨五大洲、拥有 91 个副本的 WAN 中时，Star 的吞吐量达到了 256 ktx/秒，是 Narwhal 的 2.38 倍。

papers.title: DeTA: Minimizing Data Leaks in Federated Learning via Decentralized and Trustworthy Aggregation.
papers.abstract:
Federated learning (FL) relies on a central authority to oversee and aggregate model updates contributed by multiple participating parties in the training process. This centralization of sensitive model updates naturally raises concerns about the trustworthiness of the central aggregation server, as well as the potential risks associated with server failures or breaches, which could result in loss and leaks of model updates. Moreover, recent attacks have demonstrated that, by obtaining the leaked model updates, malicious actors can even reconstruct substantial amounts of private data belonging to training participants. This underscores the critical necessity to rethink the existing FL system architecture to mitigate emerging attacks in the evolving threat landscape. One straightforward approach is to fortify the central aggregator with confidential computing (CC), which offers hardware-assisted protection for runtime computation and can be remotely verified for execution integrity. However, a growing number of security vulnerabilities have surfaced in tandem with the adoption of CC, indicating that depending solely on this singular defense may not provide the requisite resilience to thwart data leaks.

To address the security challenges inherent in the centralized aggregation paradigm and enhance system resilience, we introduce DeTA, an FL system architecture that employs a decentralized and trustworthy aggregation strategy with a defense-in-depth design. In DeTA, FL parties locally divide and shuffle their model updates at the parameter level, creating random partitions designated for multiple aggregators, all of which are shielded within CC execution environments. Moreover, to accommodate the multi-aggregator FL ecosystem, we have implemented a two-phase authentication protocol that enables new parties to verify all CC-protected aggregators and establish secure channels to upstream their model updates. With DeTA, model aggregation algorithms can function without any alterations. However, each aggregator is now oblivious to model architectures, possessing only a fragmented and shuffled view of each model update. This approach effectively mitigates attacks aimed at tampering with the aggregation process or exploiting leaked model updates, while also preserving training accuracy and minimizing performance overheads.
papers.abstract_zh:
联邦学习 (FL) 依靠中央机构来监督和汇总培训过程中多个参与方贡献的模型更新。这种敏感模型更新的集中化自然会引发人们对中央聚合服务器的可信度以及与服务器故障或违规相关的潜在风险的担忧，这可能会导致模型更新的丢失和泄漏。此外，最近的攻击表明，通过获取泄露的模型更新，恶意行为者甚至可以重建属于训练参与者的大量私人数据。这强调了重新思考现有 FL 系统架构的迫切必要性，以减轻不断变化的威胁环境中不断出现的攻击。一种简单的方法是通过机密计算（CC）来强化中央聚合器，它为运行时计算提供硬件辅助保护，并且可以远程验证执行完整性。然而，随着 CC 的采用，越来越多的安全漏洞浮出水面，这表明仅仅依靠这种单一的防御可能无法提供阻止数据泄漏所需的弹性。

为了解决中心化聚合范式固有的安全挑战并增强系统弹性，我们引入了 DeTA，这是一种 FL 系统架构，采用去中心化且值得信赖的聚合策略和深度防御设计。在 DeTA 中，FL 各方在参数级别本地划分和洗牌其模型更新，创建为多个聚合器指定的随机分区，所有这些都被屏蔽在 CC 执行环境中。此外，为了适应多聚合器 FL 生态系统，我们实施了两阶段身份验证协议，使新方能够验证所有受 CC 保护的聚合器，并建立安全通道来上传其模型更新。借助 DeTA，模型聚合算法无需任何更改即可运行。然而，每个聚合器现在都忽略了模型架构，只拥有每个模型更新的碎片化和打乱的视图。这种方法有效地减轻了旨在篡改聚合过程或利用泄露的模型更新的攻击，同时还保持了训练准确性并最大限度地减少了性能开销。

papers.title: Dordis: Efficient Federated Learning with Dropout-Resilient Differential Privacy.
papers.abstract:
Federated learning (FL) is increasingly deployed among multiple clients to train a shared model over decentralized data. To address privacy concerns, FL systems need to safeguard the clients' data from disclosure during training and control data leakage through trained models when exposed to untrusted domains. Distributed differential privacy (DP) offers an appealing solution in this regard as it achieves a balanced tradeoff between privacy and utility without a trusted server. However, existing distributed DP mechanisms are impractical in the presence of client dropout, resulting in poor privacy guarantees or degraded training accuracy. In addition, these mechanisms suffer from severe efficiency issues.

We present Dordis, a distributed differentially private FL framework that is highly efficient and resilient to client dropout. Specifically, we develop a novel 'add-then-remove' scheme that enforces a required noise level precisely in each training round, even if some sampled clients drop out. This ensures that the privacy budget is utilized prudently, despite unpredictable client dynamics. To boost performance, Dordis operates as a distributed parallel architecture via encapsulating the communication and computation operations into stages. It automatically divides the global model aggregation into several chunk-aggregation tasks and pipelines them for optimal speedup. Large-scale deployment evaluations demonstrate that Dordis efficiently handles client dropout in various realistic FL scenarios, achieving the optimal privacy-utility tradeoff and accelerating training by up to 2.4× compared to existing solutions.
papers.abstract_zh:
联邦学习 (FL) 越来越多地部署在多个客户端之间，以在分散的数据上训练共享模型。为了解决隐私问题，FL 系统需要保护客户的数据在训练期间不被泄露，并在暴露于不受信任的域时通过经过训练的模型控制数据泄漏。分布式差分隐私（DP）在这方面提供了一个有吸引力的解决方案，因为它无需可信服务器即可实现隐私和实用性之间的平衡权衡。然而，现有的分布式DP机制在存在客户端丢失的情况下是不切实际的，导致隐私保证较差或训练精度下降。此外，这些机制还存在严重的效率问题。

我们推出了 Dordis，这是一种分布式差分私有 FL 框架，它非常高效且能够适应客户端丢失。具体来说，我们开发了一种新颖的“添加然后删除”方案，即使某些采样客户退出，该方案也能在每轮训练中精确执行所需的噪声水平。尽管客户动态不可预测，这也确保了隐私预算得到谨慎利用。为了提高性能，Dordis 通过将通信和计算操作封装到阶段中，作为分布式并行架构运行。它自动将全局模型聚合划分为多个块聚合任务，并对它们进行管道化以实现最佳加速。大规模部署评估表明，Dordis 可以有效处理各种现实 FL 场景中的客户端丢失问题，实现最佳的隐私与实用性权衡，并将训练速度比现有解决方案提高高达 2.4 倍。

papers.title: Draconis: Network-Accelerated Scheduling for Microsecond-Scale Workloads.
papers.abstract:
We present Draconis, a novel scheduler for workloads in the range of tens to hundreds of microseconds. Draconis challenges the popular belief that programmable switches cannot house the complex data structures, such as queues, needed to support an in-network scheduler. Using programmable switches, Draconis achieves the low scheduling tail latency and high throughput needed to support these microsecond-scale workloads on large clusters. Furthermore, Draconis supports a wide range of complex scheduling policies, including locality-aware scheduling, priority-based scheduling, and resource-based scheduling.

Draconis reduces the 99th percentile scheduling latencies by 3×-200× when compared to state-of-the-art software-based and network-accelerated schedulers, on a range of synthetic workloads. Our evaluation also demonstrates that Draconis has 52× higher throughput than server-based scheduling systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
我们推出了 Draconis，这是一种新颖的调度程序，适用于数十到数百微秒的工作负载。 Draconis 挑战了人们普遍认为可编程交换机无法容纳支持网络内调度程序所需的复杂数据结构（例如队列）的观点。使用可编程交换机，Draconis 实现了支持大型集群上这些微秒级工作负载所需的低调度尾延迟和高吞吐量。此外，Draconis 支持各种复杂的调度策略，包括位置感知调度、基于优先级的调度和基于资源的调度。

与最先进的基于软件和网络加速的调度程序相比，Draconis 在一系列综合工作负载上将 99% 的调度延迟降低了 3×-200×。我们的评估还表明，Draconis 的吞吐量比基于服务器的调度系统高 52 倍。

papers.title: DynaPipe: Optimizing Multi-task Training through Dynamic Pipelines.
papers.abstract: Multi-task model training has been adopted to enable a single deep neural network model (often a large language model) to handle multiple tasks (e.g., question answering and text summarization). Multi-task training commonly receives input sequences of highly different lengths due to the diverse contexts of different tasks. Padding (to the same sequence length) or packing (short examples into long sequences of the same length) is usually adopted to prepare input samples for model training, which is nonetheless not space or computation efficient. This paper proposes a dynamic micro-batching approach to tackle sequence length variation and enable efficient multi-task model training. We advocate pipelineparallel training of the large model with variable-length micro-batches, each of which potentially comprises a different number of samples. We optimize micro-batch construction using a dynamic programming-based approach, and handle micro-batch execution time variation through dynamic pipeline and communication scheduling, enabling highly efficient pipeline training. Extensive evaluation on the FLANv2 dataset demonstrates up to 4.39x higher training throughput when training T5, and 3.25x when training GPT, as compared with packing-based baselines. DynaPipe's source code is publicly available at https://github.com/awslabs/optimizing-multitask-training-through-dynamic-pipelines.
papers.abstract_zh: 采用多任务模型训练，使单个深度神经网络模型（通常是大型语言模型）能够处理多个任务（例如，问答和文本摘要）。由于不同任务的上下文不同，多任务训练通常会接收长度差异很大的输入序列。通常采用填充（到相同的序列长度）或打包（将短示例放入相同长度的长序列）来准备用于模型训练的输入样本，但这在空间或计算效率上不高。本文提出了一种动态微批处理方法来解决序列长度变化并实现高效的多任务模型训练。我们提倡使用可变长度微批次对大型模型进行管道并行训练，每个微批次可能包含不同数量的样本。我们使用基于动态编程的方法优化微批量构建，并通过动态管道和通信调度处理微批量执行时间变化，从而实现高效的管道训练。对 FLANv2 数据集的广泛评估表明，与基于打包的基线相比，训练 T5 时的训练吞吐量提高了 4.39 倍，训练 GPT 时的训练吞吐量提高了 3.25 倍。 DynaPipe 的源代码可在 https://github.com/awslabs/optimizing-multitask-training-through-dynamic-pipelines 上公开获取。

papers.title: Effective Bug Detection with Unused Definitions.
papers.abstract:
Unused definitions are values assigned to variables but not used. Since unused definitions are usually considered redundant code causing no severe consequences except for wasting CPU cycles, system developers usually treat them as mild warnings and simply remove them. In this paper, we reevaluate the effect of unused definitions and discover that some unused definitions could indicate non-trivial bugs like security issues or data corruption, which calls for more attention from developers.

Although there are existing techniques to detect unused definitions, it is still challenging to detect critical bugs from unused definitions because only a small proportion of unused definitions are real bugs. In this paper, we present a static analysis framework ValueCheck to address the challenges of detecting bugs from unused definitions. First, we make a unique observation that the unused definitions on the boundary of developers' interactions are prone to be bugs. Second, we summarize syntactic and semantic patterns where unused definitions are intentionally written, which should not be considered bugs. Third, to distill bugs from unused definitions, we adopt the code familiarity metrics from the software engineering field to rank the detected bugs, which enables developers to prioritize their focus.

We evaluate ValueCheck with large system software and libraries including Linux, MySQL, OpenSSL, and NFS-ganesha. ValueCheck helps detect 210 unknown bugs from these applications. 154 bugs are confirmed by developers. Compared to state-of-the-art tools, ValueCheck demonstrates to effectively detect bugs with low false positives.
papers.abstract_zh:
未使用的定义是分配给变量但未使用的值。由于未使用的定义通常被认为是冗余代码，除了浪费 CPU 周期之外不会造成严重后果，因此系统开发人员通常将它们视为轻微警告并简单地将其删除。在本文中，我们重新评估了未使用的定义的影响，并发现一些未使用的定义可能表明存在安全问题或数据损坏等重要错误，这需要开发人员给予更多关注。

尽管现有技术可以检测未使用的定义，但从未使用的定义中检测关键错误仍然具有挑战性，因为只有一小部分未使用的定义是真正的错误。在本文中，我们提出了一个静态分析框架 ValueCheck 来解决从未使用的定义中检测错误的挑战。首先，我们进行了独特的观察，即开发人员交互边界上未使用的定义很容易出现错误。其次，我们总结了故意编写未使用的定义的语法和语义模式，这不应被视为错误。第三，为了从未使用的定义中提取错误，我们采用软件工程领域的代码熟悉度指标对检测到的错误进行排名，这使开发人员能够优先考虑他们的重点。

我们使用大型系统软件和库（包括 Linux、MySQL、OpenSSL 和 NFS-ganesha）来评估 ValueCheck。 ValueCheck 帮助检测这些应用程序中的 210 个未知错误。开发人员确认了 154 个错误。与最先进的工具相比，ValueCheck 能够有效检测错误，误报率低。

papers.title: Efficient Auditing of Event-driven Web Applications.
papers.abstract: When a deployer of a web application puts that application on a server (on-prem or cloud), how can they be sure that the application is executing as intended? This paper studies how the deployer can efficiently check that the execution is faithful. We seek mechanisms that: (i) work with web applications that are built with modern event-driven web frameworks, (ii) impose tolerable computation and communication overheads on the web server, and (iii) are complete and sound. We exhibit such a mechanism, based on a new record-replay algorithm. We have implemented our algorithm in Karousos, a system that audits Node.js web applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 当 Web 应用程序的部署者将该应用程序放置在服务器（本地或云）上时，他们如何确保应用程序按预期执行？本文研究部署者如何有效地检查执行是否忠实。我们寻求的机制：(i) 使用使用现代事件驱动的 Web 框架构建的 Web 应用程序，(ii) 在 Web 服务器上施加可容忍的计算和通信开销，以及 (iii) 完整且健全。我们展示了这样一种基于新的记录重放算法的机制。我们已经在 Karousos 中实现了我们的算法，Karousos 是一个审核 Node.js Web 应用程序的系统。

papers.title: Enoki: High Velocity Linux Kernel Scheduler Development.
papers.abstract: Kernel task scheduling is important for application performance, adaptability to new hardware, and complex user requirements. However, developing, testing, and debugging new scheduling algorithms in Linux, the most widely used cloud operating system, is slow and difficult. We developed Enoki, a framework for high velocity development of Linux kernel schedulers. Enoki schedulers are written in safe Rust, and the system supports live upgrade of new scheduling policies into the kernel, userspace debugging, and bidirectional communication with applications. A scheduler implemented with Enoki achieved near identical performance (within 1% on average) to the default Linux scheduler CFS on a wide range of benchmarks. Enoki is also able to support a range of research schedulers, specifically the Shinjuku scheduler, a locality aware scheduler, and the Arachne core arbiter, with good performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 内核任务调度对于应用程序性能、对新硬件的适应性以及复杂的用户需求非常重要。然而，在使用最广泛的云操作系统Linux中开发、测试和调试新的调度算法既缓慢又困难。我们开发了 Enoki，一个用于高速开发 Linux 内核调度程序的框架。 Enoki 调度程序是用安全的 Rust 编写的，系统支持将新的调度策略实时升级到内核、用户空间调试以及与应用程序的双向通信。使用 Enoki 实现的调度程序在各种基准测试中实现了与默认 Linux 调度程序 CFS 几乎相同的性能（平均误差在 1% 以内）。 Enoki 还能够支持一系列研究调度程序，特别是 Shinjuku 调度程序、位置感知调度程序和 Arachne 核心仲裁程序，并且具有良好的性能。

papers.title: Erlang: Application-Aware Autoscaling for Cloud Microservices.
papers.abstract:
As cloud applications shift from monoliths to loosely coupled microservices, application developers must decide how many compute resources (e.g., number of replicated containers) to assign to each microservice within an application. This decision affects both (1) the dollar cost to the application developer and (2) the end-to-end latency perceived by the application user. Today, individual microservices are autoscaled independently by adding VMs whenever per-microservice CPU or memory utilization crosses a configurable threshold. However, an application user's end-to-end latency consists of time spent on multiple microservices and each microservice might need a different number of VMs to achieve an overall end-to-end latency.

We present Erlang, an autoscaler for microservice-based applications, which collectively allocates VMs to microservices with a global goal of minimizing dollar cost while keeping end-to-end application latency under a given target. Using 5 open-source applications, we compared Erlang to several utilization and machine learning based autoscalers. We evaluate Erlang across different compute settings on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) in which users manage compute resources, GKE standard, and a new mode of operation in which the cloud provider manages compute infrastructure, GKE Autopilot. Erlang meets a desired median or tail latency target on 53 of 63 workloads where it provides a cost reduction of 19.3%, on average, over the next cheapest autoscaler. Erlang is the most cost effective autoscaling policy for 48 of these 53 workloads. The cost savings from managing a cluster with Erlang result in Erlang paying for its training cost in a few days. On smaller applications, for which we can exhaustively search microservice configurations, we find that Erlang is optimal for 90% of cases and near optimal otherwise. Code for Erlang is available at https://github.com/vigsachi/erlang
papers.abstract_zh:
随着云应用程序从整体转向松散耦合的微服务，应用程序开发人员必须决定分配给应用程序中的每个微服务的计算资源（例如，复制容器的数量）。此决定会影响 (1) 应用程序开发人员的美元成本和 (2) 应用程序用户感知的端到端延迟。如今，只要每个微服务的 CPU 或内存利用率超过可配置的阈值，单个微服务就会通过添加虚拟机来独立自动缩放。然而，应用程序用户的端到端延迟由在多个微服务上花费的时间组成，并且每个微服务可能需要不同数量的虚拟机才能实现总体端到端延迟。

我们推出了 Erlang，一种基于微服务的应用程序的自动缩放器，它将虚拟机集体分配给微服务，其全球目标是最大限度地降低美元成本，同时将端到端应用程序延迟保持在给定目标之下。我们使用 5 个开源应用程序，将 Erlang 与几种基于利用率和机器学习的自动缩放器进行了比较。我们在 Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) 上的不同计算设置中评估了 Erlang，其中用户管理计算资源、GKE 标准，以及云提供商管理计算基础设施 GKE Autopilot 的新操作模式。 Erlang 在 63 个工作负载中的 53 个上达到了期望的中值或尾部延迟目标，与第二便宜的自动缩放器相比，它平均降低了 19.3% 的成本。对于这 53 个工作负载中的 48 个来说，Erlang 是最具成本效益的自动扩展策略。使用 Erlang 管理集群所节省的成本使得 Erlang 在几天内就可以支付其培训成本。在较小的应用程序上，我们可以详尽地搜索微服务配置，我们发现 Erlang 在 90% 的情况下都是最佳的，而在其他情况下接近最佳。 Erlang 的代码可在 https://github.com/vigsachi/erlang 获取

papers.title: Exploring Performance and Cost Optimization with ASIC-Based CXL Memory.
papers.abstract: As memory-intensive applications continue to drive the need for advanced architectural solutions, Compute Express Link (CXL) has risen as a promising interconnect technology that enables seamless high-speed, low-latency communication between host processors and various peripheral devices. In this study, we explore the application performance of ASIC CXL memory in various data-center scenarios. We then further explore multiple potential impacts (e.g., throughput, latency, and cost reduction) of employing CXL memory via carefully designed policies and strategies. Our empirical results show the high potential of CXL memory, reveal multiple intriguing observations of CXL memory and contribute to the wide adoption of CXL memory in real-world deployment environments. Based on our benchmarks, we also develop an Abstract Cost Model that can estimate the cost benefit from using CXL memory.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着内存密集型应用不断推动对高级架构解决方案的需求，Compute Express Link (CXL) 已成为一种有前途的互连技术，可实现主机处理器和各种外围设备之间的无缝高速、低延迟通信。在本研究中，我们探讨了 ASIC CXL 内存在各种数据中心场景中的应用性能。然后，我们通过精心设计的策略和策略进一步探索使用 CXL 内存的多种潜在影响（例如吞吐量、延迟和成本降低）。我们的实证结果显示了 CXL 内存的巨大潜力，揭示了 CXL 内存的多个有趣的观察结果，并有助于 CXL 内存在实际部署环境中的广泛采用。根据我们的基准，我们还开发了一个抽象成本模型，可以估计使用 CXL 内存的成本效益。

papers.title: Exploring the Asynchrony of Slow Memory Filesystem with EasyIO.
papers.abstract: We introduce EasyIO, a new approach to explore asynchronous I/O on filesystems designed for (disaggregated) nonvolatile memories to improve CPU efficiency. EasyIO offloads expensive memory movement operations to the on-chip DMA engine and harvests the unleashed CPU cycles by transparently interleaving asynchronous I/Os with fine-grained application tasks. We further adopt a completion buffer-centric design to improve EasyIO's efficiency and schedulability; internally, orderless file operation and two-level locking are incorporated to break the serial order between file metadata and data, thus accelerating read and write operations and defusing deadlock risks. EasyIO also introduces a traffic-aware channel manager to fulfill the diverse performance goals of applications. Extensive experimental results show that, compared to conventional synchronous filesystems, EasyIO significantly reduces CPU consumption (using less than 88% of cores at most) while achieving comparable peak bandwidth; EasyIO also achieves 1.03-2.3× speedups across eight real-world applications. When achieving these goals, EasyIO exhibits higher but tolerable latencies for read operations due to the task interleaving.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出 EasyIO，这是一种探索文件系统上异步 I/O 的新方法，专为（分解的）非易失性存储器而设计，以提高 CPU 效率。 EasyIO 将昂贵的内存移动操作卸载到片上 DMA 引擎，并通过透明地将异步 I/O 与细粒度应用程序任务交错来获取释放的 CPU 周期。我们进一步采用以完成缓冲区为中心的设计来提高EasyIO的效率和可调度性；内部采用无序文件操作和二级锁定，打破文件元数据和数据之间的串行顺序，从而加速读写操作，化解死锁风险。 EasyIO 还引入了流量感知通道管理器来满足应用程序的不同性能目标。大量实验结果表明，与传统同步文件系统相比，EasyIO 显着降低了 CPU 消耗（最多使用不到 88% 的内核），同时实现了可比的峰值带宽； EasyIO 还在八个实际应用程序中实现了 1.03-2.3 倍的加速。在实现这些目标时，由于任务交错，EasyIO 的读取操作表现出较高但可以容忍的延迟。

papers.title: Finding Correctness Bugs in eBPF Verifier with Structured and Sanitized Program.
papers.abstract:
eBPF is an inspiring technique in Linux that allows user space processes to extend the kernel by dynamically injecting programs. However, it poses security issues, since the untrusted user code is now executed in the kernel space. eBPF utilizes a verifier to validate the safety of the provided programs, thus its correctness is of paramount importance as attackers may exploit vulnerabilities within it to inject malicious programs. Bug-finding tools like kernel fuzzers currently can detect memory bugs in eBPF system calls, but they experience difficulties in finding correctness bugs in the verifier, e.g., incorrect validations that allow the loading of unsafe programs. Because, unlike detecting memory bugs, where sanitizers can capture such errors once observed, automatically uncovering correctness bugs is very difficult, without an effective test oracle that determines if the verifier behaves correctly for given programs.

In this paper, we propose an effective approach to automatically detect the verifier's correctness bugs. Our core observation is that since the verifier aims to ensure that eBPF programs do not affect the security of the kernel, any illegal behaviors in verified programs are indicators of correctness bugs in the verifier. Indeed, we can convert the detection of logical errors in the verifier to traditional bug finding in eBPF programs. Based on such insight, we devise two indicators for correctness bugs and propose corresponding sanitation mechanisms to capture them, both of which naturally form an effective test oracle. We implemented our idea in a tool, namely BVF, which generates structured eBPF programs to pass the verifier, and subsequently, it finds correctness bugs by detecting runtime errors in verified programs with the indicators. Experiments show that although the verifier has received extensive scrutiny and has been intensively tested by tools like Syzkaller and Buzzer, BVF still found 11 previously unknown vulnerabilities in eBPF, of which six are correctness bugs of critical severity in the verifier.
papers.abstract_zh:
eBPF is an inspiring technique in Linux that allows user space processes to extend the kernel by dynamically injecting programs. However, it poses security issues, since the untrusted user code is now executed in the kernel space. eBPF利用验证器来验证所提供程序的安全性，因此其正确性至关重要，因为攻击者可能会利用其中的漏洞注入恶意程序。像内核模糊器这样的错误查找工具目前可以检测 eBPF 系统调用中的内存错误，但它们在查找验证器中的正确性错误时遇到困难，例如允许加载不安全程序的错误验证。因为，与检测内存错误不同，清理程序可以在观察到此类错误后捕获此类错误，而如果没有有效的测试预言机来确定验证程序对于给定程序的行为是否正确，自动发现正确性错误是非常困难的。

在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的方法来自动检测验证者的正确性错误。我们的核心观察是，由于验证器的目的是确保 eBPF 程序不会影响内核的安全，因此经过验证的程序中的任何非法行为都是验证器中正确性错误的指标。事实上，我们可以将验证器中逻辑错误的检测转换为 eBPF 程序中传统的错误查找。基于这种洞察，我们设计了两个正确性错误指标，并提出相应的卫生机制来捕获它们，这两者自然形成了有效的测试预言机。我们在一个名为 BVF 的工具中实现了我们的想法，它生成结构化的 eBPF 程序来通过验证器，随后，它通过使用指标检测已验证程序中的运行时错误来发现正确性错误。实验表明，尽管验证器接受了广泛的审查，并经过 Syzkaller 和 Buzzer 等工具的密集测试，BVF 仍然在 eBPF 中发现了 11 个先前未知的漏洞，其中 6 个是验证器中严重程度的正确性错误。

papers.title: FLOAT: Federated Learning Optimizations with Automated Tuning.
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a powerful approach that enables collaborative distributed model training without the need for data sharing. However, FL grapples with inherent heterogeneity challenges leading to issues such as stragglers, dropouts, and performance variations. Selection of clients to run an FL instance is crucial, but existing strategies introduce biases and participation issues and do not consider resource efficiency. Communication and training acceleration solutions proposed to increase client participation also fall short due to the dynamic nature of system resources. We address these challenges in this paper by designing FLOAT, a novel framework designed to boost FL client resource awareness. FLOAT optimizes resource utilization dynamically for meeting training deadlines, and mitigates stragglers and dropouts through various optimization techniques; leading to enhanced model convergence and improved performance. FLOAT leverages multi-objective Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) to automate the selection of the optimization techniques and their configurations, tailoring them to individual client resource conditions. Moreover, FLOAT seamlessly integrates into existing FL systems, maintaining non-intrusiveness and versatility for both asynchronous and synchronous FL settings. As per our evaluations, FLOAT increases accuracy by up to 53%, reduces client dropouts by up to 78×, and improves communication, computation, and memory utilization by up to 81×, 44×, and 20× respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 已成为一种强大的方法，无需数据共享即可实现协作分布式模型训练。然而，FL 努力应对固有的异质性挑战，从而导致落后者、辍学和表现变化等问题。选择运行 FL 实例的客户端至关重要，但现有策略引入了偏见和参与问题，并且没有考虑资源效率。由于系统资源的动态特性，为提高客户参与度而提出的通信和培训加速解决方案也存在不足。我们在本文中通过设计 FLOAT 来解决这些挑战，FLOAT 是一个旨在提高 FL 客户端资源意识的新颖框架。 FLOAT 动态优化资源利用率以满足训练期限，并通过各种优化技术减少落后者和辍学者；从而增强模型收敛性并提高性能。 FLOAT 利用带有人工反馈的多目标强化学习 (RLHF) 来自动选择优化技术及其配置，并根据各个客户的资源条件进行定制。此外，FLOAT 无缝集成到现有 FL 系统中，保持异步和同步 FL 设置的非侵入性和多功能性。根据我们的评估，FLOAT 将准确率提高了 53%，将客户端丢失率降低了 78 倍，并将通信、计算和内存利用率分别提高了 81 倍、44 倍和 20 倍。

papers.title: FLOWS: Balanced MRC Profiling for Heterogeneous Object-Size Cache.
papers.abstract:
While Miss Ratio Curve (MRC) profiling methods based on spatial sampling are effective in modeling cache behaviors, previous MRC studies lack in-depth analysis of profiling errors and primarily target homogeneous object-size scenarios. This has caused imbalanced errors of existing MRC approaches when employed in heterogeneous object-size caches. For instance, in CDN traces, the error of the Byte Miss Ratio Curve (BMRC) could be two orders of magnitude larger than that of the Object Miss Ratio Curve (OMRC).

In this paper, we reveal an important insight from our experimental analysis, namely, the source of profiling inaccuracy is twofold, the "imbalanced requests" and the heterogeneous object-size distribution. To this end, we propose FLOWS, a Filtered LOw-variance Weighted Sampling approach, to address the root causes of the problem by combining a Cache Filter, designed to balance sampled requests, with a Weighted Sampling technique, designed to reduce bytelevel estimation error. FLOWS constructs a more accurate MRC for traces with heterogeneous content popularity and object sizes. Evaluation on real-world traces demonstrates that FLOWS reduces the error of the BMRC and OMRC profiling by 16× and 3×, respectively, compared with state-of-the-art approaches. Additionally, FLOWS enables cache systems to effectively balance the Byte Hit Ratio (BHR) and Object Hit Ratio (OHR), achieving an improvement of up to 26.5% in overall hit rate compared to other methods.
papers.abstract_zh:
虽然基于空间采样的未命中率曲线 (MRC) 分析方法可以有效地对缓存行为进行建模，但之前的 MRC 研究缺乏对分析错误的深入分析，并且主要针对同质对象大小场景。当现有 MRC 方法应用于异构对象大小缓存时，这会导致不平衡错误。例如，在 CDN 跟踪中，字节丢失率曲线 (BMRC) 的误差可能比对象丢失率曲线 (OMRC) 的误差大两个数量级。

在本文中，我们从实验分析中揭示了一个重要的见解，即分析不准确的根源是双重的，“不平衡的请求”和异构的对象大小分布。为此，我们提出了 FLOWS，一种过滤低方差加权采样方法，通过将旨在平衡采样请求的缓存过滤器与旨在减少字节级估计误差的加权采样技术相结合来解决问题的根本原因。 FLOWS 为具有异构内容流行度和对象大小的跟踪构建更准确的 MRC。对现实世界轨迹的评估表明，与最先进的方法相比，FLOWS 将 BMRC 和 OMRC 分析的误差分别降低了 16 倍和 3 倍。此外，FLOWS使缓存系统能够有效平衡字节命中率（BHR）和对象命中率（OHR），与其他方法相比，整体命中率提高高达26.5%。

papers.title: GMorph: Accelerating Multi-DNN Inference via Model Fusion.
papers.abstract: AI-powered applications often involve multiple deep neural network (DNN)-based prediction tasks to support application-level functionalities. However, executing multi-DNNs can be challenging due to the high resource demands and computation costs that increase linearly with the number of DNNs. Multi-task learning (MTL) addresses this problem by designing a multi-task model that shares parameters across tasks based on a single backbone DNN. This paper explores an alternative approach called model fusion: rather than training a single multi-task model from scratch as MTL does, model fusion fuses multiple task-specific DNNs that are pre-trained separately and can have heterogeneous architectures into a single multi-task model. We materialize model fusion in a software framework called GMorph to accelerate multi-DNN inference while maintaining task accuracy. GMorph features three main technical contributions: graph mutations to fuse multi-DNNs into resource-efficient multi-task models, search-space sampling algorithms, and predictive filtering to reduce the high search costs. Our experiments show that GMorph can outperform MTL baselines and reduce the inference latency of multi-DNNs by 1.1-3× while meeting the target task accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: AI 支持的应用程序通常涉及多个基于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的预测任务，以支持应用程序级功能。然而，由于资源需求和计算成本随着 DNN 数量的增加而线性增加，执行多个 DNN 可能具有挑战性。多任务学习 (MTL) 通过设计一个多任务模型来解决这个问题，该模型基于单个骨干 DNN 跨任务共享参数。本文探索了一种称为模型融合的替代方法：模型融合不像 MTL 那样从头开始训练单个多任务模型，而是将多个单独预训练且可以具有异构架构的特定于任务的 DNN 融合到单个多任务模型中。我们在名为 GMorph 的软件框架中实现模型融合，以加速多 DNN 推理，同时保持任务准确性。 GMorph 具有三个主要技术贡献：将多个 DNN 融合到资源高效的多任务模型中的图突变、搜索空间采样算法以及用于降低高搜索成本的预测过滤。我们的实验表明，GMorph 可以超越 MTL 基线，并将多 DNN 的推理延迟降低 1.1-3 倍，同时满足目标任务精度。

papers.title: Halflife: An Adaptive Flowlet-based Load Balancer with Fading Timeout in Data Center Networks.
papers.abstract: Modern data centers (DCs) employ various traffic load balancers to achieve high bisection bandwidth. Among them, flowlet switching has shown remarkable performance in both load balancing and upper-layer protocol (e.g., TCP) friendliness. However, flowlet-based load balancers suffer from the inflexibility of flowlet timeout value (FTV) and result in sub-optimal performance under various application workloads. To this end, we propose Halflife, a novel flowlet-based load balancer that leverages fading FTVs to reroute traffic promptly under different workloads without any prior knowledge. Halflife not only balances traffic better, but also avoids the performance degradation caused by frequent oscillation or shifting of lows between paths. Furthermore, Halflife's fading mechanism is not only compatible with most flowlet-based load balancers, such as CONGA and LetFlow, but also improves their performance when leveraging flowlet switching in RDMA network. Through testbed experiments and simulations, we prove that Halflife improves the performance of CONGA and LetFlow by 10% ~ 150%, and it outperforms other load balancers by 30% ~ 200% across most application workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心 (DC) 采用各种流量负载平衡器来实现高平分带宽。其中，Flowlet交换在负载均衡和上层协议（例如TCP）友好性方面都表现出了出色的性能。然而，基于 Flowlet 的负载均衡器受到 Flowlet 超时值 (FTV) 不灵活性的影响，并导致在各种应用程序工作负载下性能不佳。为此，我们提出了 Halflife，这是一种基于 Flowlet 的新型负载均衡器，它利用衰落 FTV 在不同工作负载下迅速重新路由流量，而无需任何先验知识。 Halflife不仅可以更好地平衡流量，还可以避免路径之间频繁振荡或低点移动导致的性能下降。此外，Halflife 的衰落机制不仅与大多数基于 Flowlet 的负载均衡器（例如 CONGA 和 LetFlow）兼容，而且还提高了它们在 RDMA 网络中利用 Flowlet 交换时的性能。通过测试床实验和模拟，我们证明Halflife将CONGA和LetFlow的性能提高了10% ~ 150%，并且在大多数应用程序工作负载上比其他负载均衡器性能高出30% ~ 200%。

papers.title: HAP: SPMD DNN Training on Heterogeneous GPU Clusters with Automated Program Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Single-Program-Multiple-Data (SPMD) parallelism has recently been adopted to train large deep neural networks (DNNs). Few studies have explored its applicability on heterogeneous clusters, to fully exploit available resources for large model learning. This paper presents HAP, an automated system designed to expedite SPMD DNN training on heterogeneous clusters. HAP jointly optimizes the tensor sharding strategy, sharding ratios across heterogeneous devices and the communication methods for tensor exchanges for optimized distributed training with SPMD parallelism. We novelly formulate model partitioning as a program synthesis problem, in which we generate a distributed program from scratch on a distributed instruction set that semantically resembles the program designed for a single device, and systematically explore the solution space with an A-based search algorithm. We derive the optimal tensor sharding ratios by formulating it as a linear programming problem. Additionally, HAP explores tensor communication optimization in a heterogeneous cluster and integrates it as part of the program synthesis process, for automatically choosing optimal collective communication primitives and applying sufficient factor broadcasting technique. Extensive experiments on representative workloads demonstrate that HAP achieves up to 2.41x speed-up on heterogeneous clusters.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近采用单程序多数据（SPMD）并行性来训练大型深度神经网络（DNN）。很少有研究探索其在异构集群上的适用性，以充分利用可用资源进行大型模型学习。本文介绍了 HAP，这是一种自动化系统，旨在加速异构集群上的 SPMD DNN 训练。 HAP 联合优化张量分片策略、跨异构设备的分片比率以及张量交换的通信方法，以通过 SPMD 并行性优化分布式训练。我们新颖地将模型分区表述为程序综合问题，其中我们在分布式指令集上从头开始生成分布式程序，其语义类似于为单个设备设计的程序，并使用基于 A 的搜索算法系统地探索解决方案空间。我们通过将其表述为线性规划问题来导出最佳张量分片比率。此外，HAP探索异构集群中的张量通信优化，并将其集成为程序合成过程的一部分，用于自动选择最佳集体通信原语并应用充分因子广播技术。对代表性工作负载的大量实验表明，HAP 在异构集群上实现了高达 2.41 倍的加速。

papers.title: HD-IOV: SW-HW Co-designed I/O Virtualization with Scalability and Flexibility for Hyper-Density Cloud.
papers.abstract:
As the resource density of cloud servers increases, cloud providers deploy hundreds of VMs concurrently on a single server, requiring a high-performance, scalable, flexible and high-density I/O virtualization method. Hardware assisted virtualization such as device pass-through with SR-IOV can achieve near-native performance, however, at the expense of flexibility and a limited device count. Traditional software-based I/O virtualization systems tend to dedicate additional computing cores for higher performance, but suffer from critical scalability problems especially in high-density cloud.

In this paper, the proposed Hyper-Density I/O virtualization (HD-IOV) system tries to achieve pass-through level performance without scalability and flexibility limitations in previous works. HD-IOV is a software-hardware co-designed I/O virtualization solution. The core insight of HD-IOV is to decouple virtualization and resource management logic from hardware devices to software, reducing device complexity and enabling more flexible hardware resource management. DMA transactions and interrupts are sent directly to guest VMs without VM exits. Isolation is achieved by leveraging an existing PCIe feature, allowing IOMMU to enforce queue pair level isolation. Extensive experiments show that HD-IOV achieves similar performance as SR-IOV for both network and accelerator devices. Furthermore, HD-IOV supports maximally 2.96x higher device count with 2.9x faster median device initialization time, which is critical for emerging container and lightweight VM systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着云服务器资源密度的增加，云提供商在单台服务器上同时部署数百个虚拟机，需要高性能、可扩展、灵活的高密度I/O虚拟化方法。硬件辅助虚拟化（例如使用 SR-IOV 的设备直通）可以实现接近本机的性能，但代价是灵活性和有限的设备数量。传统的基于软件的 I/O 虚拟化系统往往会专门使用额外的计算核心来获得更高的性能，但会遇到关键的可扩展性问题，尤其是在高密度云中。

在本文中，提出的超密度 I/O 虚拟化（HD-IOV）系统试图实现直通级性能，而不受先前工作中可扩展性和灵活性的限制。 HD-IOV是软硬件协同设计的I/O虚拟化解决方案。 HD-IOV的核心思想是将虚拟化和资源管理逻辑从硬件设备解耦到软件，降低设备复杂性，实现更灵活的硬件资源管理。 DMA 事务和中断直接发送到来宾 VM，无需 VM 退出。隔离是通过利用现有 PCIe 功能实现的，允许 IOMMU 强制执行队列对级别隔离。大量实验表明，HD-IOV 在网络和加速器设备方面都实现了与 SR-IOV 相似的性能。此外，HD-IOV 支持的设备数量最多增加 2.96 倍，设备初始化时间中位数加快 2.9 倍，这对于新兴容器和轻量级 VM 系统至关重要。

papers.title: Hoda: a High-performance Open vSwitch Dataplane with Multiple Specialized Data Paths.
papers.abstract: Open vSwitch (OvS) has been widely used in cloud networks in view of its programmability and flexibility. However, we observe a huge performance drop when it loads practical cloud networking services (e.g., tunneling and firewalling). Our further analysis reveals that the root cause lies in the gap between the needs of supporting various selections of packet header fields and the one-size-fits-all data path in the vanilla OvS. Motivated by this, we design Hoda, a high-performance OvS dataplane with multiple specialized data paths. Specifically, Hoda constructs the specialized parser and microflow cache for each OpenFlow program so as to achieve lightweight parsing and caching. We also propose a configurable version of Hoda that introduces configuration knobs in the data path to ease specialization. The experiments with real-life OpenFlow rules show that Hoda achieves up to 1.7× speed up over the state-of-the-art OvS and 1.5× speed up over mSwitch. Hoda has also been deployed in a large cloud to serve various online services; the A/B test in the cloud reveals a 20% request process time reduction for Ngnix services.
papers.abstract_zh: Open vSwitch（OvS）因其可编程性和灵活性而在云网络中得到了广泛的应用。然而，我们观察到当它加载实际的云网络服务（例如隧道和防火墙）时，性能会出现巨大下降。我们的进一步分析表明，根本原因在于支持各种数据包头字段选择的需求与普通 OvS 中通用的数据路径之间的差距。受此启发，我们设计了 Hoda，一种具有多个专用数据路径的高性能 OvS 数据平面。具体来说，Hoda为每个OpenFlow程序构建了专门的解析器和微流缓存，以实现轻量级的解析和缓存。我们还提出了 Hoda 的可配置版本，它在数据路径中引入了配置旋钮以简化专业化。使用现实 OpenFlow 规则进行的实验表明，Hoda 的速度比最先进的 OvS 提高了 1.7 倍，比 mSwitch 提高了 1.5 倍。 Hoda也被部署在大型云中，以服务各种在线服务；云中的 A/B 测试显示 Ngnix 服务的请求处理时间减少了 20%。

papers.title: Improving GPU Energy Efficiency through an Application-transparent Frequency Scaling Policy with Performance Assurance.
papers.abstract: Power consumption is one of the top limiting factors in high-performance computing systems and data centers, and dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) is an important mechanism to control power. Existing works using DVFS to improve GPU energy efficiency suffer from the limitation that their policies either impact performance too much or require offline application profiling or code modification, which severely limits their applicability on large clusters. To address this issue, we propose a novel GPU DVFS policy, GEEPAFS, which improves the energy efficiency of GPUs while providing performance assurance. GEEPAFS is application-transparent as it does not require any offline profiling or code modification on user applications. To achieve this, GEEPAFS models application performance online based on our quantitative analysis of a correlation between performance and GPU memory bandwidth utilization. Based on their relationship, GEEPAFS builds a fold-line frequency-performance model for applications being executed, and it applies the model to guide the setting of GPU frequency to maximize energy efficiency while ensuring the performance loss is bounded. Through experiments on NVIDIA V100 and A100 GPUs, we show that GEEPAFS is able to improve the energy efficiency by 26.7% and 20.2% on average. While achieving this improvement, the average performance loss is only 5.8%, and the worst-case performance loss is 12.5% among all 33 tested applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 功耗是高性能计算系统和数据中心的首要限制因素之一，动态电压和频率调节（DVFS）是控制功耗的重要机制。现有的使用 DVFS 来提高 GPU 能效的工作都受到限制，即它们的策略要么对性能影响太大，要么需要离线应用程序分析或代码修改，这严重限制了它们在大型集群上的适用性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 GPU DVFS 策略 GEEPAFS，它在提供性能保证的同时提高了 GPU 的能源效率。 GEEPAFS 是应用程序透明的，因为它不需要对用户应用程序进行任何离线分析或代码修改。为了实现这一目标，GEEPAFS 基于我们对性能与 GPU 内存带宽利用率之间相关性的定量分析，在线对应用程序性能进行建模。基于它们的关系，GEEPAFS为正在执行的应用程序构建了一个折线频率性能模型，并应用该模型来指导GPU频率的设置，以最大限度地提高能源效率，同时确保性能损失有限。通过在NVIDIA V100和A100 GPU上的实验，我们表明GEEPAFS能够平均提高能源效率26.7%和20.2%。在实现这一改进的同时，在所有 33 个测试的应用程序中，平均性能损失仅为 5.8%，最坏情况下的性能损失为 12.5%。

papers.title: Improving Resource and Energy Efficiency for Cloud 3D through Excessive Rendering Reduction.
papers.abstract:
The rise of cloud gaming makes interactive 3D applications an emerging type of data center workload. However, the excessive rendering in current cloud 3D systems leads to large gaps between the cloud and client frame rates (FPS, frames per second), thus wasting resources and power. Although FPS regulation can remove excessive rendering, due to the highly-varying frame processing time and the use of rendering delays, existing cloud FPS regulation solutions have low FPS and slow motion-to-photon (MtP) latency, causing violations of Quality-of-Service (QoS) requirements.

In this paper, we present a novel cloud FPS regulation solution, called OnDemand Rendering (ODR). ODR employs multi-buffering, dynamic rendering delay/acceleration, and input processing prioritization to reduce excessive rendering and ensure QoS satisfaction. ODR was evaluated in our private cloud and Google cloud. Evaluation results showed that ODR effectively removed excessive rendering, thus improving DRAM performance by 19% and reducing power usage by 16% over no FPS regulation. Better memory efficiency also allowed ODR to increase client FPS by 5.5%. Moreover, ODR reduced average MtP latency by more than 92% and outperformed existing FPS regulations. More importantly, ODR's high FPS and low latency make it feasible to deploy 3D applications to conventional public clouds.
papers.abstract_zh:
云游戏的兴起使得交互式 3D 应用程序成为一种新兴的数据中心工作负载类型。然而，当前云3D系统中的过度渲染导致云端和客户端帧速率（FPS，每秒帧数）之间存在较大差距，从而浪费资源和电力。虽然 FPS 调节可以消除过度渲染，但由于帧处理时间变化很大以及渲染延迟的使用，现有的云 FPS 调节解决方案具有低 FPS 和慢运动到光子 (MtP) 延迟，导致违反服务质量 (QoS) 要求。

在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的云 FPS 调节解决方案，称为按需渲染 (ODR)。 ODR采用多缓冲、动态渲染延迟/加速和输入处理优先级来减少过度渲染并确保QoS满足。 ODR 在我们的私有云和 Google 云中进行了评估。评估结果显示，ODR有效消除了过度渲染，与无FPS调节相比，DRAM性能提高了19%，功耗降低了16%。更好的内存效率还使 ODR 能够将客户端 FPS 提高 5.5%。此外，ODR 将平均 MtP 延迟降低了 92% 以上，并且优于现有的 FPS 法规。更重要的是，ODR 的高 FPS 和低延迟使得将 3D 应用程序部署到传统公共云成为可能。

papers.title: Jade: A High-throughput Concurrent Copying Garbage Collector.
papers.abstract: Garbage collection (GC) pauses are a notorious issue threatening the latency of applications. To mitigate this problem, state-of-the-art concurrent copying collectors allow GC threads to run simultaneously with application threads (mutators) in nearly all GC phases. However, the design of concurrent copying collectors does not always lead to low application latency. To this end, this work studies the behaviors of mainstream concurrent copying collectors in OpenJDK and mainly focuses on long application pauses under heavy workloads. By analyzing the design of those collectors, this work uncovers that lengthy pre-reclamation cycles (including GC phases before actual memory release), high GC frequency, and large metadata maintenance overhead are major factors for long pauses. Therefore, this work proposes Jade, a concurrent copying collector aiming to achieve both short pauses and high GC efficiency. Compared with existing collectors, Jade provides a group-wise collection mechanism to shorten pre-reclamation cycles while controlling GC frequency. It also embraces a generational heap layout and a single-phase algorithm to maximize young GC's throughput. The evaluation results on representative latency-critical applications show that Jade can reach sub-millisecond-level pauses even under heavy workloads and significantly improve applications' peak throughput compared with state-of-the-art concurrent collectors.
papers.abstract_zh: 垃圾收集 (GC) 暂停是一个威胁应用程序延迟的臭名昭著的问题。为了缓解这个问题，最先进的并发复制收集器允许 GC 线程在几乎所有 GC 阶段与应用程序线程（变异器）同时运行。然而，并发复制收集器的设计并不总能带来低应用程序延迟。为此，本工作研究了 OpenJDK 中主流并发复制收集器的行为，主要关注重负载下的长时间应用程序暂停。通过分析这些收集器的设计，这项工作发现，较长的预回收周期（包括实际内存释放之前的 GC 阶段）、高 GC 频率和大量元数据维护开销是长时间暂停的主要因素。因此，本文提出了 Jade，一种并发复制收集器，旨在实现短暂停和高 GC 效率。与现有的收集器相比，Jade 提供了分组收集机制，可以缩短预回收周期，同时控制 GC 频率。它还采用分代堆布局和单阶段算法来最大限度地提高年轻 GC 的吞吐量。对代表性延迟关键应用程序的评估结果表明，即使在繁重的工作负载下，Jade 也可以达到亚毫秒级的暂停，并且与最先进的并发收集器相比，显着提高了应用程序的峰值吞吐量。

papers.title: Just-In-Time Checkpointing: Low Cost Error Recovery from Deep Learning Training Failures.
papers.abstract: Deep Learning training jobs process large amounts of training data using many GPU devices, often running for weeks or months. When hardware or software failures happen, these jobs need to restart, losing the memory state for the Deep Neural Network (DNN) model trained so far, unless checkpointing mechanisms are used to save training state periodically. However, for large models, periodic checkpointing incurs significant steady state overhead, and during recovery, a large number of GPUs need to redo work since the last checkpoint. This is especially problematic when failures are frequent for large DNN (such as Large Language Model) training jobs using many GPUs. In this paper, we present a novel approach of just-in-time checkpointing when failures happen, which enables recovery from failures with just a single minibatch iteration of work replayed by all GPUs. This reduces the cost of error recovery from several minutes to a few seconds per GPU, with nearly zero steady state overhead. This also avoids the guesswork of choosing a checkpointing frequency since failure rates usually have high variance. We discuss how just-in-time checkpointing can be enabled in training code, as well as design of key mechanisms for transparent just-in-time checkpointing without user code change. We analyze the wasted GPU work of just-in-time checkpointing and show that it is less than periodic checkpointing for large numbers of GPUs. We present results from our implementation in modern AI cluster infrastructure.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习训练作业使用许多 GPU 设备处理大量训练数据，通常运行数周或数月。当发生硬件或软件故障时，这些作业需要重新启动，从而丢失迄今为止训练的深度神经网络（DNN）模型的内存状态，除非使用检查点机制定期保存训练状态。然而，对于大型模型，定期检查点会产生显着的稳态开销，并且在恢复期间，大量 GPU 需要重做自上一个检查点以来的工作。当使用许多 GPU 的大型 DNN（例如大型语言模型）训练作业频繁失败时，这尤其成问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种在发生故障时实时设置检查点的新颖方法，只需由所有 GPU 重放的单个小批量工作迭代即可从故障中恢复。这将每个 GPU 的错误恢复成本从几分钟减少到几秒钟，并且稳态开销几乎为零。这也避免了选择检查点频率的猜测，因为失败率通常具有很高的方差。我们讨论如何在训练代码中启用即时检查点，以及在不更改用户代码的情况下实现透明即时检查点的关键机制的设计。我们分析了即时检查点所浪费的 GPU 工作，并表明它比大量 GPU 的定期检查点要少。我们展示了在现代人工智能集群基础设施中实施的结果。

papers.title: LSGraph: A Locality-centric High-performance Streaming Graph Engine.
